\\\"swimswam_docs_sparse\\\"\\nDEFAULT_QDRANT_DENSE_COLLECTION = \\\"swimswam_chunks_dense_1024\\\"\\n\\n\\n@dataclass(frozen=True)\\nclass HybridConfig:\\n    es_url: str\\n    es_api_key: str\\n    es_index: str\\n    qdrant_url: str\\n    qdrant_api_key: str\\n    qdrant_sparse_collection: str\\n    qdrant_dense_collection: str\\n    chunk_size: int\\n    chunk_overlap: int\\n    dimensions: int\\n    ollama_url: str\\n    ollama_model: str\\n    ollama_timeout: float\\n    env_file: str = \\\"\\\"\\n\\n    @property\\n    def es_index_titles(self) -> str:\\n        return self.es_index\\n\\n    @property\\n    def qdrant_docs_collection(self) -> str:\\n        return self.qdrant_sparse_collection\\n\\n    @property\\n    def qdrant_chunks_collection(self) -> str:\\n        return self.qdrant_dense_collection\\n\\n\\ndef _first_env(names: Iterable[str], default: str) -> str:\\n    for name in names:\\n        value = os.getenv(name, \\\"\\\").strip()\\n        if value:\\n            return value\\n    return default\\n\\n\\ndef _candidate_env_files(explicit_env_file: Optional[str] = None) -> list[Path]:\\n    candidates: list[Path] = []\\n    if explicit_env_file:\\n        candidates.append(Path(explicit_env_file).expanduser())\\n\\n    env_override = os.getenv(\\\"HYBRID_STORE_ENV_FILE\\\", \\\"\\\").strip()\\n    if env_override:\\n        candidates.append(Path(env_override).expanduser())\\n\\n    candidates.append(Path.cwd() / \\\".env\\\")\\n    candidates.append(Path(__file__).resolve().parents[1] / \\\".env\\\")\\n\\n    deduped: list[Path] = []\\n    seen: set[Path] = set()\\n    for candidate in candidates:\\n        resolved = candidate.resolve()\\n        if resolved in seen:\\n            continue\\n        seen.add(resolved)\\n        deduped.append(resolved)\\n    return deduped\\n\\n\\ndef resolve_env_file(explicit_env_file: Optional[str] = None) -> str:\\n    for candidate in _candidate_env_files(explicit_env_file):\\n        if candidate.is_file():\\n            return str(candidate)\\n    return \\\"\\\"\\n\\n\\ndef load_config(env_file: Optional[str] = None) -> HybridConfig:\\n    resolved_env_file = resolve_env_file(env_file)\\n    if resolved_env_file:\\n        load_dotenv(resolved_env_file, override=False)\\n\\n    return HybridConfig(\\n        es_url=_first_env([\\\"ES_URL\\\"], \\\"http://127.0.0.1:9200\\\"),\\n        es_api_key=_first_env([\\\"ES_API_KEY\\\"], \\\"\\\"),\\n        es_index=_first_env([\\\"HYBRID_ES_INDEX\\\", \\\"ES_INDEX\\\", \\\"ES_INDEX_TITLES\\\"], DEFAULT_ES_INDEX),\\n        qdrant_url=_first_env([\\\"QDRANT_URL\\\"], \\\"\\\"),\\n        qdrant_api_key=_first_env([\\\"QDRANT_API_KEY\\\"], \\\"\\\"),\\n        qdrant_sparse_collection=_first_env(\\n            [\\\"HYBRID_QDRANT_SPARSE_COLLECTION\\\", \\\"QDRANT_SPARSE_COLLECTION\\\", \\\"QDRANT_DOCS_COLLECTION\\\"],\\n            DEFAULT_QDRANT_SPARSE_COLLECTION,\\n        ),\\n        qdrant_dense_collection=_first_env(\\n            [\\\"HYBRID_QDRANT_DENSE_COLLECTION\\\", \\\"QDRANT_DENSE_COLLECTION\\\", \\\"QDRANT_CHUNKS_COLLECTION\\\"],\\n            DEFAULT_QDRANT_DENSE_COLLECTION,\\n        ),\\n        chunk_size=max(200, int(_first_env([\\\"CHUNK_SIZE\\\"], \\\"700\\\"))),\\n        chunk_overlap=max(0, int(_first_env([\\\"CHUNK_OVERLAP\\\"], \\\"120\\\"))),\\n        dimensions=int(_first_env([\\\"QDRANT_DENSE_DIMENSIONS\\\"], \\\"1024\\\")),\\n        ollama_url=_first_env([\\\"OLLAMA_URL\\\"], \\\"http://127.0.0.1:11434\\\"),\\n        ollama_model=_first_env([\\\"OLLAMA_MODEL\\\"], \\\"qwen3-embedding:0.6b\\\"),\\n articles table (BM25/fts) + chunks table (dense vectors).\\n\\\"\\\"\\\"\\nimport sys\\nimport time\\nfrom pathlib import Path\\n\\nsys.path.insert(0, str(Path(__file__).resolve().parent.parent))\\n\\nfrom hybrid_store import PgStore\\n\\nDSN = \\\"postgresql://neondb_owner:npg_jZM7zDpA3rSR@ep-dawn-hill-aidlry37-pooler.c-4.us-east-1.aws.neon.tech/neondb?sslmode=require\\\"\\nTABLE = \\\"swimswam_articles\\\"\\nCHUNKS_TABLE = \\\"swimswam_chunks\\\"\\n\\n\\ndef test_connection():\\n    print(\\\"1. Test connection...\\\")\\n    with PgStore(DSN, table=TABLE) as store:\\n        assert store.chunks_table == CHUNKS_TABLE\\n        count = store.get_count()\\n        print(f\\\"   Connected OK. Articles: {count}\\\")\\n        chunk_count = store.get_count(\\\"chunks\\\")\\n        print(f\\\"   Chunks: {chunk_count}\\\")\\n        store.ensure_collections()\\n        print(\\\"   ensure_collections() OK (no-op)\\\")\\n    print(\\\"   PASS\\\\n\\\")\\n\\n\\ndef test_write_read_title():\\n    print(\\\"2. Test write_title / read_title cycle...\\\")\\n    with PgStore(DSN, table=TABLE) as store:\\n        url = \\\"https://swimswam.com/test-e2e-article-12345\\\"\\n        result = store.write_title(\\n            url=url,\\n            title=\\\"E2E Test Article Title\\\",\\n            homepage_time=\\\"2026-03-28T10:00:00+00:00\\\",\\n            fetch_status=\\\"pending\\\",\\n            comment_count_hint=5,\\n        )\\n        print(f\\\"   write_title: {result}\\\")\\n        assert result[\\\"url\\\"] == store.normalize_url(url)\\n\\n        read = store.read_title(url)\\n        print(f\\\"   read_title: found={read['found']} title={read.get('title','')[:50]}\\\")\\n        assert read[\\\"found\\\"] is True\\n        assert read[\\\"title\\\"] == \\\"E2E Test Article Title\\\"\\n        assert read[\\\"metadata\\\"][\\\"fetch_status\\\"] == \\\"pending\\\"\\n        assert read[\\\"metadata\\\"][\\\"comment_count_hint\\\"] == 5\\n\\n        read2 = store.read_title(\\\"https://swimswam.com/does-not-exist-999\\\")\\n        assert read2[\\\"found\\\"] is False\\n        print(\\\"   non-existent read: found=False OK\\\")\\n    print(\\\"   PASS\\\\n\\\")\\n\\n\\ndef test_list_pending():\\n    print(\\\"3. Test list_pending...\\\")\\n    with PgStore(DSN, table=TABLE) as store:\\n        pending = store.list_pending(limit=5)\\n        print(f\\\"   Found {len(pending)} pending articles\\\")\\n        assert len(pending) > 0\\n        assert all(p[\\\"fetch_status\\\"] == \\\"pending\\\" for p in pending)\\n    print(\\\"   PASS\\\\n\\\")\\n\\n\\ndef test_update_fetch_status():\\n    print(\\\"4. Test update_fetch_status...\\\")\\n    with PgStore(DSN, table=TABLE) as store:\\n        url = \\\"https://swimswam.com/test-e2e-article-12345\\\"\\n        result = store.update_fetch_status(url, \\\"processing\\\")\\n        print(f\\\"   update to processing: {result}\\\")\\n        assert result[\\\"updated\\\"] is True\\n\\n        read = store.read_title(url)\\n        assert read[\\\"metadata\\\"][\\\"fetch_status\\\"] == \\\"processing\\\"\\n\\n        store.update_fetch_status(url, \\\"pending\\\")\\n    print(\\\"   PASS\\\\n\\\")\\n\\n\\ndef test_upsert_article_with_chunks():\\n    print(\\\"5. Test upsert_article with chunking + embedding...\\\")\\n    with PgStore(DSN, table=TABLE) as store:\\n        url = \\\"https://swimswam.com/test-e2e-article-12345\\\"\\n        body = (\\n            \\\"This is a test article about competitive swimming at the 2026 NCAA championships. \\\"\\n            \\\"The event featured incredible performances in freestyle, backstroke, and butterfly events. \\\"\\n            \\\"Multiple records were broken during the three-day competition.\\\\n\\\\n\\\"\\n            \\\"In the 200m freestyle, the winning time of 1:32.45 shattered the previous record by over a second. \\\"\\n            \\\"The crowd erupted as the swimmer touched the wall, realizing they had witnessed history.\\\\n\\\\n\\\"\\n            \\\"The butterfly events were equally thrilling, with two swimmers going under the old record in the same heat.\\\"\\n        )\\n        comments = [\\n            \\\"Great article! The 200m freestyle was absolutely insane.\\\",\\n            \\\"Amazing performances by the swimmers. NCAA swimming is getting faster every year.\\\",\\n        ]\\n        result = store.upsert_article(\\n            url=url,\\n            title=\\\"E2E Test Article Title\\\",\\n            body=body,\\n            comments=comments,\\n            published_time=\\\"2026-03-28T10:00:00+00:00\\\",\\n        )\\n        print(f\\\"   upsert result: {result}\\\")\\n        assert result[\\\"chunks_upserted\\\"] >= 2, f\\\"Expected >=2 chunks (body+comments), got {result['chunks_upserted']}\\\"\\n\\n        # Verify article row\\n        read = store.read_title(url)\\n        assert read[\\\"found\\\"] is True\\n        assert read[\\\"metadata\\\"][\\\"fetch_status\\\"] == \\\"success\\\"\\n\\n        # Verify chunks in DB\\n        with store.pool.connection() as conn:\\n            rows = conn.execute(\\n                f\\\"SELECT id, chunk_type, chunk_index, length(chunk_text) as len, embedding IS NOT NULL as has_vec \\\"\\n                f\\\"FROM {CHUNKS_TABLE} WHERE article_url = %s ORDER BY chunk_type, chunk_index\\\",\\n                [store.normalize_url(url)],\\n            ).fetchall()\\n        print(f\\\"   Chunks in DB: {len(rows)}\\\")\\n        body_chunks = [r for r in rows if r[\\\"chunk_type\\\"] == \\\"body\\\"]\\n        comment_chunks = [r for r in rows if r[\\\"chunk_type\\\"] == \\\"comment\\\"]\\n        print(f\\\"   Body chunks: {len(body_chunks)}, Comment chunks: {len(comment_chunks)}\\\")\\n        for r in rows:\\n            print(f\\\"     - type={r['chunk_type']} idx={r['chunk_index']} len={r['len']} has_vec={r['has_vec']}\\\")\\n        assert len(body_chunks) >= 1\\n        assert len(comment_chunks) >= 1\\n        assert all(r[\\\"has_vec\\\"] for r in rows), \\\"All chunks must have embeddings\\\"\\n    print(\\\"   PASS\\\\n\\\")\\n\\n\\ndef test_fts_search():\\n    print(\\\"6. Test BM25 full-text search (articles table)...\\\")\\n    with PgStore(DSN, table=TABLE) as store:\\n        results = store.search_fts(\\\"NCAA swimming championships\\\", top_k=5)\\n        print(f\\\"   FTS results: {len(results)} hits\\\")\\n        for r in results[:3]:\\n            print(f\\\"     - [{r.get('rank', 0):.4f}] {r['title'][:60]}\\\")\\n        assert len(results) > 0\\n    print(\\\"   PASS\\\\n\\\")\\n\\n\\ndef test_vector_search():\\n    print(\\\"7. Test vector semantic search (chunks table)...\\\")\\n    with PgStore(DSN, table=TABLE) as store:\\n        results = store.search_vector(\\\"competitive swimming records\\\", top_k=5)\\n        print(f\\\"   Vector results: {len(results)} hits\\\")\\n        for r in results[:3]:\\n            print(f\\\"     - [dist={r.get('distance', 0):.4f}] {r['title'][:60]} chunk_type={r.get('chunk_type')}\\\")\\n        assert len(results) > 0\\n        # Should return article-level URLs (DISTINCT ON)\\n        urls = [r[\\\"url\\\"] for r in results]\\n        assert len(urls) == len(set(urls)), \\\"Vector search should return distinct URLs\\\"\\n    print(\\\"   PASS\\\\n\\\")\\n\\n\\ndef test_hybrid_search():\\n    print(\\\"8. Test hybrid search (BM25 + vector RRF)...\\\")\\n    with PgStore(DSN, table=TABLE) as store:\\n        results = store.search(\\\"swimming championships butterfly\\\", top_k=5, return_full=True)\\n        hybrid = results[\\\"hybrid_rows\\\"]\\n        fts = results[\\\"fts_rows\\\"]\\n        vec = results[\\\"vec_rows\\\"]\\n        print(f\\\"   Hybrid: {len(hybrid)} results, FTS: {len(fts)}, Vector: {len(vec)}\\\")\\n        for r in hybrid[:3]:\\n            print(f\\\"     - [rrf={r['rrf_score']:.6f}] {r['title'][:60]}\\\")\\n        assert len(hybrid) > 0\\n    print(\\\"   PASS\\\\n\\\")\\n\\n\\ndef test_toast_compression():\\n    print(\\\"9. Test TOAST compression on large text...\\\")\\n    with PgStore(DSN, table=TABLE) as store:\\n        url = \\\"https://swimswam.com/test-e2e-large-article-99999\\\"\\n        large_body = \\\"Swimming is a wonderful sport. \\\" * 200  # ~6KB, enough for TOAST + a few chunks\\n        store.write_title(url=url, title=\\\"Large Article Test\\\")\\n        result = store.upsert_article(\\n            url=url,\\n            title=\\\"Large Article Test\\\",\\n            body=large_body,\\n            published_time=\\\"2026-03-28T12:00:00+00:00\\\",\\n        )\\n        print(f\\\"   Inserted ~{len(large_body)//1024}KB article, chunks={result['chunks_upserted']}\\\")\\n        assert result[\\\"chunks_upserted\\\"] > 1, \\\"Large article should produce multiple chunks\\\"\\n\\n        # Verify storage compression\\n        with store.pool.connection() as conn:\\n            row = conn.execute(\\n                \\\"SELECT pg_column_size(full_text) as raw_size, octet_length(full_text) as logical_size \\\"\\n                f\\\"FROM {TABLE} WHERE url = %s\\\",\\n                [store.normalize_url(url)],\\n            ).fetchone()\\n            if row:\\n                raw = row[\\\"raw_size\\\"]\\n                logical = row[\\\"logical_size\\\"]\\n                ratio = logical / raw if raw else 0\\n                print(f\\\"   TOAST: logical={logical} bytes, stored={raw} bytes, ratio={ratio:.1f}x\\\")\\n                assert ratio > 2, f\\\"Expected some compression, got {ratio:.1f}x\\\"\\n    print(\\\"   PASS\\\\n\\\")\\n\\n\\ndef test_chunk_splitting():\\n    print(\\\"10. Test chunk splitting logic...\\\")\\n    chunks = PgStore._split_text(\\n        \\\"Paragraph one about swimming.\\\\n\\\\n\\\"\\n        \\\"Paragraph two about diving.\\\\n\\\\n\\\"\\n        \\\"Paragraph three about water polo.\\\",\\n        chunk_size=60,\\n        chunk_overlap=0,\\n    )\\n    print(f\\\"   Split into {len(chunks)} chunks\\\")\\n    for i, c in enumerate(chunks):\\n        print(f\\\"     [{i}] ({len(c)} chars) {c[:50]}...\\\")\\n    assert len(chunks) >= 2\\n\\n    # Empty text\\n    assert PgStore._split_text(\\\"\\\") == []\\n    assert PgStore._split_text(\\\"   \\\") == []\\n    print(\\\"   PASS\\\\n\\\")\\n\\n\\ndef test_cleanup():\\n    print(\\\"11. Cleanup test data...\\\")\\n    with PgStore(DSN, table=TABLE) as store:\\n        with store.pool.connection() as conn:\\n            # Chunks are CASCADE deleted when articles are deleted\\n            conn.execute(\\n                f\\\"DELETE FROM {TABLE} WHERE url LIKE %s\\\",\\n                [\\\"https://swimswam.com/test-e2e-%\\\"],\\n            )\\n        count = store.get_count()\\n        chunk_count = store.get_count(\\\"chunks\\\")\\n        print(f\\\"   Cleaned up. Articles: {count}, Chunks: {chunk_count}\\\")\\n    print(\\\"   PASS\\\\n\\\")\\n\\n\\nif __name__ == \\\"__main__\\\":\\n    print(\\\"=\\\" * 60)\\n    print(\\\"PgStore E2E Test Suite (two-table: articles + chunks)\\\")\\n    print(\\\"=\\\" * 60 + \\\"\\\\n\\\")\\n\\n    t0 = time.time()\\n    tests = [\\n        test_connection,\\n        test_write_read_title,\\n        test_list_pending,\\n        test_update_fetch_status,\\n        test_upsert_article_with_chunks,\\n        test_fts_search,\\n        test_vector_search,\\n        test_hybrid_search,\\n        test_toast_compression,\\n        test_chunk_splitting,\\n        test_cleanup,\\n    ]\\n\\n    passed = 0\\n    failed = annotations\\\\n\\\\nimport argparse\\\\nimport asyncio\\\\nimport json\\\\nimport sys\\\\nimport uuid\\\\nfrom dataclasses import asdict\\\\nfrom dataclasses import replace\\\\nfrom pathlib import Path\\\\nfrom typing import Optional\\\\n\\\\nfrom config import settings\\\\nfrom harness.checkpoint import CheckpointStore\\\\nfrom harness.db import HarnessDB\\\\nfrom harness.handoff import HandoffProtocol\\\\nfrom harness.intake import IntakeAgent\\\\nfrom harness.models import (\\\\n    IntakeResult,\\\\n    PermissionRequestRecord,\\\\n    QuotaEventRecord,\\\\n    RiskLevel,\\\\n    StageCheckpoint,\\\\n    StageRecord,\\\\n    TaskRecord,\\\\n    TaskStatus,\\\\n)\\\\nfrom harness.permission_gate import PermissionGate\\\\nfrom harness.quota_router import AllQuotaExhaustedError, QuotaRouter\\\\nfrom harness.stage_executor import PermissionBlockedError, QuotaExhaustedError, StageExecutionError, StageExecutor\\\\nfrom harness.task_queue import TaskQueue, utcnow_iso\\\\n\\\\n\\\\nclass Harness:\\\\n    \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"Main scheduler that turns queued tasks into stage executions.\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\n\\\\n    def __init__(\\\\n        self,\\\\n        *,\\\\n        db_path: str | Path = settings.HARNESS_DB_PATH,\\\\n        artifact_root: str | Path = settings.HARNESS_ARTIFACT_DIR,\\\\n        intake_agent: Optional[IntakeAgent] = None,\\\\n        quota_router: Optional[QuotaRouter] = None,\\\\n        stage_executor: Optional[StageExecutor] = None,\\\\n    ) -> None:\\\\n        self.db = HarnessDB(db_path)\\\\n        self.task_queue = TaskQueue(self.db)\\\\n        self.handoff = HandoffProtocol(artifact_root)\\\\n        self.checkpoints = CheckpointStore(artifact_root)\\\\n        self.intake = intake_agent or IntakeAgent()\\\\n        self.router = quota_router or QuotaRouter()\\\\n        self.executor = stage_executor or StageExecutor()\\\\n\\\\n    def submit_task(\\\\n        self,\\\\n        description: str,\\\\n        *,\\\\n        title: Optional[str] = None,\\\\n        goal: Optional[str] = None,\\\\n        verify_cmd: Optional[str] = None,\\\\n        priority: int = 50,\\\\n        working_dir: Optional[str] = None,\\\\n    ) -> TaskRecord:\\\\n        intake = self.intake.plan_task(description, goal=goal, verify_cmd=verify_cmd)\\\\n        if title:\\\\n            intake = replace(intake, title=title)\\\\n        return self.submit_intake(intake, priority=priority, working_dir=working_dir)\\\\n\\\\n    def submit_intake(\\\\n        self,\\\\n        intake: IntakeResult,\\\\n        *,\\\\n        priority: int = 50,\\\\n        working_dir: Optional[str] = None,\\\\n        status: TaskStatus = TaskStatus.EXECUTING,\\\\n    ) -> TaskRecord:\\\\n        task = self.task_queue.create_task(\\\\n            title=intake.title,\\\\n            description=intake.description,\\\\n            goal=intake.goal,\\\\n            verify_cmd=intake.verify_cmd,\\\\n            complexity=intake.complexity,\\\\n            priority=priority,\\\\n            status=status,\\\\n            working_dir=working_dir,\\\\n        )\\\\n        self.task_queue.save_stages(task.task_id, intake.stages)\\\\n        return task\\\\n\\\\n    async def run_once(self) -> Optional[TaskRecord]:\\\\n        await self._recover_paused_quota_tasks()\\\\n        task = self.task_queue.pick_next_runnable_task()\\\\n        if task is None:\\\\n            return None\\\\n\\\\n        if self.task_queue.count_stages(task.task_id) == 0:\\\\n            await self._plan_missing_stages(task)\\\\n            task = self.task_queue.get_task(task.task_id) or task\\\\n\\\\n        stage = self.task_queue.next_pending_stage(task.task_id)\\\\n        if stage is None:\\\\n            await self._finish_task(task)\\\\n            return self.task_queue.get_task(task.task_id)\\\\n\\\\n        await self._run_stage(task, stage)\\\\n        return self.task_queue.get_task(task.task_id)\\\\n\\\\n    async def run_forever(self, poll_interval_sec: int = settings.HARNESS_POLL_INTERVAL_SEC) -> None:\\\\n        while True:\\\\n            task = await self.run_once()\\\\n            if task is None:\\\\n                await asyncio.sleep(poll_interval_sec)\\\\n\\\\n    def status_report(self) -> list[dict[str, object]]:\\\\n        report: list[dict[str, object]] = []\\\\n        for task in self.task_queue.list_tasks():\\\\n            report.append(\\\\n                {\\\\n                    \\\\\\\"task_id\\\\\\\": task.task_id,\\\\n                    \\\\\\\"title\\\\\\\": task.title,\\\\n                    \\\\\\\"status\\\\\\\": task.status.value,\\\\n                    \\\\\\\"priority\\\\\\\": task.priority,\\\\n                    \\\\\\\"complexity\\\\\\\": task.complexity,\\\\n                    \\\\\\\"working_dir\\\\\\\": task.working_dir,\\\\n                    \\\\\\\"stages\\\\\\\": [\\\\n                        {\\\\n                            \\\\\\\"stage_type\\\\\\\": stage.stage_type,\\\\n                            \\\\\\\"status\\\\\\\": stage.status.value,\\\\n                            \\\\\\\"assigned_model\\\\\\\": stage.assigned_model,\\\\n                            \\\\\\\"retry_count\\\\\\\": stage.retry_count,\\\\n                        }\\\\n                        for stage in self.task_queue.list_stages(task.task_id)\\\\n                    ],\\\\n                }\\\\n            )\\\\n        return report\\\\n\\\\n    def inspect_task(self, task_id: str) -> dict[str, object]:\\\\n        task = self.task_queue.get_task(task_id)\\\\n        if task is None:\\\\n            raise KeyError(f\\\\\\\"Task not found: {task_id}\\\\\\\")\\\\n\\\\n        stages = self.task_queue.list_stages(task_id)\\\\n        return {\\\\n            \\\\\\\"task\\\\\\\": {\\\\n                \\\\\\\"task_id\\\\\\\": task.task_id,\\\\n                \\\\\\\"title\\\\\\\": task.title,\\\\n                \\\\\\\"description\\\\\\\": task.description,\\\\n                \\\\\\\"goal\\\\\\\": task.goal,\\\\n                \\\\\\\"verify_cmd\\\\\\\": task.verify_cmd,\\\\n                \\\\\\\"status\\\\\\\": task.status.value,\\\\n                \\\\\\\"priority\\\\\\\": task.priority,\\\\n                \\\\\\\"complexity\\\\\\\": task.complexity,\\\\n                \\\\\\\"working_dir\\\\\\\": task.working_dir,\\\\n                \\\\\\\"created_at\\\\\\\": task.created_at,\\\\n                \\\\\\\"updated_at\\\\\\\": task.updated_at,\\\\n            },\\\\n            \\\\\\\"stages\\\\\\\": [\\\\n                {\\\\n                    \\\\\\\"stage_id\\\\\\\": stage.stage_id,\\\\n                    \\\\\\\"stage_type\\\\\\\": stage.stage_type,\\\\n                    \\\\\\\"model_role\\\\\\\": stage.model_role,\\\\n                    \\\\\\\"status\\\\\\\": stage.status.value,\\\\n                    \\\\\\\"assigned_model\\\\\\\": stage.assigned_model,\\\\n                    \\\\\\\"assigned_provider\\\\\\\": stage.assigned_provider,\\\\n                    \\\\\\\"handoff_doc_path\\\\\\\": stage.handoff_doc_path,\\\\n                    \\\\\\\"result_summary\\\\\\\": stage.result_summary,\\\\n                    \\\\\\\"retry_count\\\\\\\": stage.retry_count,\\\\n                    \\\\\\\"verify_cmd\\\\\\\": stage.verify_cmd,\\\\n                    \\\\\\\"metadata\\\\\\\": stage.metadata,\\\\n                }\\\\n                for stage in stages\\\\n            ],\\\\n            \\\\\\\"permission_requests\\\\\\\": [\\\\n                {\\\\n                    \\\\\\\"request_id\\\\\\\": item.request_id,\\\\n                    \\\\\\\"stage_id\\\\\\\": item.stage_id,\\\\n                    \\\\\\\"action\\\\\\\": item.action,\\\\n                    \\\\\\\"risk_level\\\\\\\": item.risk_level.value,\\\\n                    \\\\\\\"decision\\\\\\\": item.decision,\\\\n                    \\\\\\\"voters\\\\\\\": item.voters,\\\\n                    \\\\\\\"decided_at\\\\\\\": item.decided_at,\\\\n                }\\\\n                for stage in stages\\\\n                for item in self.task_queue.list_permission_requests(stage.stage_id)\\\\n            ],\\\\n            \\\\\\\"checkpoints\\\\\\\": [\\\\n                asdict(checkpoint) for checkpoint in self.checkpoints.list_for_task(task_id)\\\\n            ],\\\\n        }\\\\n\\\\n    def pause_task(self, task_id: str) -> None:\\\\n        self.task_queue.update_task_status(task_id, TaskStatus.PAUSED_PERMISSION)\\\\n\\\\n    def resume_task(self, task_id: str) -> None:\\\\n        task = self.task_queue.get_task(task_id)\\\\n        if task is None:\\\\n            raise KeyError(f\\\\\\\"Task not found: {task_id}\\\\\\\")\\\\n        if task.status in {TaskStatus.DONE, TaskStatus.FAILED}:\\\\n            raise ValueError(f\\\\\\\"Cannot resume task in terminal status {task.status.value}\\\\\\\")\\\\n        self.task_queue.update_task_status(task_id, TaskStatus.EXECUTING)\\\\n\\\\n    def quota_report(self) -> list[dict[str, object]]:\\\\n        snapshots = self.router.quota_manager.fetch_all_quotas()\\\\n        return [\\\\n            {\\\\n                \\\\\\\"provider\\\\\\\": snapshot.provider.value,\\\\n                \\\\\\\"email\\\\\\\": snapshot.email,\\\\n                \\\\\\\"remaining_percent\\\\\\\": snapshot.remaining_percent,\\\\n                \\\\\\\"reset_at\\\\\\\": snapshot.reset_at_readable,\\\\n                \\\\\\\"time_until_reset_hours\\\\\\\": round(snapshot.time_until_reset_hours, 1),\\\\n            }\\\\n            for snapshot in snapshots\\\\n        ]\\\\n\\\\n    async def _plan_missing_stages(self, task: TaskRecord) -> None:\\\\n        self.task_queue.update_task_status(task.task_id, TaskStatus.PLANNING)\\\\n        intake = self.intake.plan_task(task.description, goal=task.goal, verify_cmd=task.verify_cmd)\\\\n        self.task_queue.save_stages(task.task_id, intake.stages)\\\\n        self.task_queue.update_task_status(task.task_id, TaskStatus.EXECUTING)\\\\n\\\\n    async def _recover_paused_quota_tasks(self) -> None:\\\\n        for task in self.task_queue.list_tasks(TaskStatus.PAUSED_QUOTA):\\\\n            stage = self.task_queue.next_pending_stage(task.task_id)\\\\n            if stage is None:\\\\n                continue\\\\n            if self.router.can_run_stage(task, stage):\\\\n                self.task_queue.update_task_status(task.task_id, TaskStatus.EXECUTING)\\\\n                self.task_queue.log_quota_event(\\\\n                    QuotaEventRecord(\\\\n                        event_id=uuid.uuid4().hex,\\\\n                        provider=stage.assigned_provider or \\\\\\\"unknown\\\\\\\",\\\\n                        account_email=None,\\\\n                        event_type=\\\\\\\"recovered\\\\\\\",\\\\n                        details={\\\\\\\"task_id\\\\\\\": task.task_id, \\\\\\\"stage_id\\\\\\\": stage.stage_id},\\\\n                        created_at=utcnow_iso(),\\\\n                    )\\\\n                )\\\\n\\\\n    async def _run_stage(self, task: TaskRecord, stage: StageRecord) -> None:\\\\n        try:\\\\n            if not stage.assigned_model or not stage.assigned_provider:\\\\n                choice = self.router.select_model(task, stage)\\\\n                self.task_queue.assign_stage_model(stage.stage_id, choice.model, choice.provider)\\\\n                stage = self.task_queue.get_stage(stage.stage_id) or stage\\\\n\\\\n            previous = self.task_queue.list_completed_stages(task.task_id)\\\\n            handoff_path = self.handoff.write_handoff(task, stage, previous)\\\\n            self.task_queue.mark_stage_running(stage.stage_id, str(handoff_path))\\\\n            stage = self.task_queue.get_stage(stage.stage_id) or stage\\\\n\\\\n            result = await self.executor.execute(stage, str(handoff_path), task.working_dir)\\\\n            if stage.verify_cmd and task.working_dir:\\\\n                verification = await self.executor.run_verify_cmd(stage.verify_cmd, task.working_dir)\\\\n                if verification.returncode != 0:\\\\n                    raise StageExecutionError(verification.stderr.strip() or verification.stdout.strip() or stage.verify_cmd)\\\\n\\\\n            self.handoff.save_stage_output(task, stage, result)\\\\n            self.task_queue.complete_stage(\\\\n\\\",\\\"exit_code\\\":0,\\\"status\\\":\\\"completed\\\"}}\\n{\\\"type\\\":\\\"item.started\\\",\\\"item\\\":{\\\"id\\\":\\\"item_5\\\",\\\"type\\\":\\\"command_execution\\\",\\\"command\\\":\\\"/bin/bash -lc \\\\\\\"sed -n '1,360p' harness/quota_router.py\\\\\\\"\\\",\\\"aggregated_output\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"exit_code\\\":null,\\\"status\\\":\\\"in_progress\\\"}}\\n{\\\"type\\\":\\\"item.completed\\\",\\\"item\\\":{\\\"id\\\":\\\"item_5\\\",\\\"type\\\":\\\"command_execution\\\",\\\"command\\\":\\\"/bin/bash -lc \\\\\\\"sed -n '1,360p' harness/quota_router.py\\\\\\\"\\\",\\\"aggregated_output\\\":\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"Quota-aware model routing.\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\nfrom __future__ import annotations\\\\n\\\\nimport json\\\\nfrom pathlib import Path\\\\nfrom typing import Any, Optional\\\\n\\\\nimport yaml\\\\n\\\\nfrom config import settings\\\\nfrom harness.chat2api_client import Chat2APIClient\\\\nfrom harness.models import ModelChoice, StageRecord, TaskRecord\\\\nfrom models.quota_manager import QuotaManager, QuotaSnapshot\\\\n\\\\n\\\\nclass AllQuotaExhaustedError(RuntimeError):\\\\n    \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"Raised when no configured candidate model is currently usable.\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\n\\\\n\\\\nclass QuotaRouter:\\\\n    \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"Select a model using role preferences, availability, and quota heuristics.\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\n\\\\n    def __init__(\\\\n        self,\\\\n        catalog_path: str | Path = settings.HARNESS_ROLE_MODELS_PATH,\\\\n        *,\\\\n        quota_manager: Optional[QuotaManager] = None,\\\\n        chat_client: Optional[Chat2APIClient] = None,\\\\n        min_remaining_pct: int = settings.HARNESS_MIN_QUOTA_PCT,\\\\n        enable_llm_selector: bool = True,\\\\n    ) -> None:\\\\n        self.catalog_path = Path(catalog_path)\\\\n        self.quota_manager = quota_manager or QuotaManager()\\\\n        self.chat_client = chat_client or Chat2APIClient()\\\\n        self.min_remaining_pct = min_remaining_pct\\\\n        self.enable_llm_selector = enable_llm_selector\\\\n        self.catalog = self._load_catalog()\\\\n\\\\n    def _load_catalog(self) -> dict[str, Any]:\\\\n        with open(self.catalog_path, \\\\\\\"r\\\\\\\", encoding=\\\\\\\"utf-8\\\\\\\") as handle:\\\\n            return yaml.safe_load(handle) or {}\\\\n\\\\n    def models_for_role(self, role: str) -> list[str]:\\\\n        roles = self.catalog.get(\\\\\\\"roles\\\\\\\", {})\\\\n        configured = roles.get(role)\\\\n        if configured:\\\\n            return list(configured)\\\\n        return list(self.catalog.get(\\\\\\\"models\\\\\\\", {}).keys())\\\\n\\\\n    def get_model_info(self, model: str) -> dict[str, Any]:\\\\n        return dict(self.catalog.get(\\\\\\\"models\\\\\\\", {}).get(model, {}))\\\\n\\\\n    def chat2api_id(self, model: str) -> str:\\\\n        \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"Return the chat2api model ID for a catalog model name.\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\n        info = self.get_model_info(model)\\\\n        return info.get(\\\\\\\"chat2api_id\\\\\\\", model)\\\\n\\\\n    def list_available_models(self) -> list[str]:\\\\n        \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"Return catalog model names whose chat2api_id is live.\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\n        try:\\\\n            live_ids = set(self.chat_client.list_models())\\\\n        except Exception:\\\\n            return list(self.catalog.get(\\\\\\\"models\\\\\\\", {}).keys())\\\\n        if not live_ids:\\\\n            return list(self.catalog.get(\\\\\\\"models\\\\\\\", {}).keys())\\\\n        return [\\\\n            name\\\\n            for name in self.catalog.get(\\\\\\\"models\\\\\\\", {})\\\\n            if self.chat2api_id(name) in live_ids\\\\n        ]\\\\n\\\\n    def can_run_stage(\\\\n        self,\\\\n        task: TaskRecord,\\\\n        stage: StageRecord,\\\\n        *,\\\\n        quota_snapshot: Optional[list[QuotaSnapshot]] = None,\\\\n        available_models: Optional[list[str]] = None,\\\\n    ) -> bool:\\\\n        try:\\\\n            self.select_model(task, stage, quota_snapshot=quota_snapshot, available_models=available_models)\\\\n        except AllQuotaExhaustedError:\\\\n            return False\\\\n        return True\\\\n\\\\n    def select_model(\\\\n        self,\\\\n        task: TaskRecord,\\\\n        stage: StageRecord,\\\\n        *,\\\\n        quota_snapshot: Optional[list[QuotaSnapshot]] = None,\\\\n        available_models: Optional[list[str]] = None,\\\\n    ) -> ModelChoice:\\\\n        quotas = quota_snapshot if quota_snapshot is not None else self.quota_manager.fetch_all_quotas()\\\\n        available = set(available_models or self.list_available_models())\\\\n        eligible = self._eligible_candidates(self.models_for_role(stage.model_role), quotas, available)\\\\n\\\\n        if not eligible:\\\\n            raise AllQuotaExhaustedError(\\\\n                f\\\\\\\"No eligible model for role={stage.model_role} with min_remaining={self.min_remaining_pct}%\\\\\\\"\\\\n            )\\\\n\\\\n        if self.enable_llm_selector:\\\\n            llm_choice = self._select_with_llm(task, stage, quotas, eligible)\\\\n            if llm_choice is not None:\\\\n                return llm_choice\\\\n\\\\n        return self._fallback_select(task, stage, eligible)\\\\n\\\\n    def _eligible_candidates(\\\\n        self,\\\\n        candidates: list[str],\\\\n        quotas: list[QuotaSnapshot],\\\\n        available: set[str],\\\\n    ) -> list[tuple[str, str, Optional[QuotaSnapshot]]]:\\\\n        eligible: list[tuple[str, str, Optional[QuotaSnapshot]]] = []\\\\n        for model in candidates:\\\\n            if model not in available:\\\\n                continue\\\\n            provider = self.get_model_info(model).get(\\\\\\\"provider\\\\\\\")\\\\n            if not provider:\\\\n                continue\\\\n\\\\n            provider_snapshots = [\\\\n                snapshot\\\\n                for snapshot in quotas\\\\n                if snapshot.provider.value == provider and snapshot.remaining_percent >= self.min_remaining_pct\\\\n            ]\\\\n            if provider_snapshots:\\\\n                eligible.append((model, provider, max(provider_snapshots, key=self._score_snapshot)))\\\\n            elif provider == \\\\\\\"github\\\\\\\":\\\\n                eligible.append((model, provider, None))\\\\n        return eligible\\\\n\\\\n    def _select_with_llm(\\\\n        self,\\\\n        task: TaskRecord,\\\\n        stage: StageRecord,\\\\n        quotas: list[QuotaSnapshot],\\\\n        eligible: list[tuple[str, str, Optional[QuotaSnapshot]]],\\\\n    ) -> ModelChoice | None:\\\\n        selector_model = self._pick_selector_model()\\\\n        if selector_model is None:\\\\n            return None\\\\n\\\\n        prompt = self._build_selection_prompt(task, stage, quotas, eligible)\\\\n        try:\\\\n            raw = self.chat_client.chat(\\\\n                model=selector_model,\\\\n                prompt=prompt,\\\\n                system=(\\\\n                    \\\\\\\"You are code-orchestra's model router. \\\\\\\"\\\\n                    \\\\\\\"Return compact JSON with fields model, provider, account, reason.\\\\\\\"\\\\n                ),\\\\n            )\\\\n            parsed = json.loads(raw)\\\\n        except Exception:\\\\n            return None\\\\n\\\\n        chosen_model = parsed.get(\\\\\\\"model\\\\\\\")\\\\n        if not isinstance(chosen_model, str):\\\\n            return None\\\\n\\\\n        eligible_models = {model: (provider, snapshot) for model, provider, snapshot in eligible}\\\\n        selected = eligible_models.get(chosen_model)\\\\n        if selected is None:\\\\n            return None\\\\n\\\\n        provider, snapshot = selected\\\\n        if snapshot is not None:\\\\n            requested_account = parsed.get(\\\\\\\"account\\\\\\\")\\\\n            if isinstance(requested_account, str) and requested_account and requested_account != snapshot.email:\\\\n                alternative = next(\\\\n                    (\\\\n                        quota\\\\n                        for quota in quotas\\\\n                        if quota.provider.value == provider\\\\n                        and quota.email == requested_account\\\\n                        and quota.remaining_percent >= self.min_remaining_pct\\\\n                    ),\\\\n                    None,\\\\n                )\\\\n                if alternative is not None:\\\\n                    snapshot = alternative\\\\n\\\\n        return ModelChoice(\\\\n            model=chosen_model,\\\\n            provider=provider,\\\\n            account_email=snapshot.email if snapshot is not None else None,\\\\n            reason=str(parsed.get(\\\\\\\"reason\\\\\\\") or \\\\\\\"llm_selector\\\\\\\"),\\\\n        )\\\\n\\\\n    def _fallback_select(\\\\n        self,\\\\n        task: TaskRecord,\\\\n        stage: StageRecord,\\\\n        eligible: list[tuple[str, str, Optional[QuotaSnapshot]]],\\\\n    ) -> ModelChoice:\\\\n        best_choice: ModelChoice | None = None\\\\n        best_score: float | None = None\\\\n\\\\n        for role_index, (model, provider, snapshot) in enumerate(eligible):\\\\n            role_bonus = max(0, 40 - role_index * 10)\\\\n            if snapshot is not None:\\\\n                total_score = role_bonus + self._score_snapshot(snapshot)\\\\n                choice = ModelChoice(\\\\n                    model=model,\\\\n                    provider=provider,\\\\n                    account_email=snapshot.email,\\\\n                    reason=(\\\\n                        f\\\\\\\"fallback: role={stage.model_role}, complexity={task.complexity}, \\\\\\\"\\\\n                        f\\\\\\\"remaining={snapshot.remaining_percent}%, \\\\\\\"\\\\n                        f\\\\\\\"reset_in={snapshot.time_until_reset_hours:.1f}h\\\\\\\"\\\\n                    ),\\\\n                )\\\\n            else:\\\\n                total_score = role_bonus + self._score_provider_without_snapshot(provider)\\\\n                choice = ModelChoice(\\\\n                    model=model,\\\\n                    provider=provider,\\\\n                    account_email=None,\\\\n                    reason=f\\\\\\\"fallback: role={stage.model_role}, complexity={task.complexity}, provider={provider}\\\\\\\",\\\\n                )\\\\n\\\\n            if best_score is None or total_score > best_score:\\\\n                best_score = total_score\\\\n                best_choice = choice\\\\n\\\\n        if best_choice is None:\\\\n            raise AllQuotaExhaustedError(\\\\n                f\\\\\\\"No eligible model for role={stage.model_role} with min_remaining={self.min_remaining_pct}%\\\\\\\"\\\\n            )\\\\n        return best_choice\\\\n\\\\n    def _pick_selector_model(self) -> str | None:\\\\n        \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"Pick the cheapest available model to use as the LLM selector.\\\\n\\\\n        Returns the *chat2api_id* since the selector call goes directly to chat2api.\\\\n        \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\n        preferred = (\\\\\\\"gpt-4o\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\"claude-haiku-4-5\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\"gemini-3.1-pro\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\"gpt-5.4-codex\\\\\\\")\\\\n        available = set(self.list_available_models())\\\\n        for model in preferred:\\\\n            if model in available:\\\\n                return self.chat2api_id(model)\\\\n        return None\\\\n\\\\n    def _build_selection_prompt(\\\\n        self,\\\\n        task: TaskRecord,\\\\n        stage: StageRecord,\\\\n        quotas: list[QuotaSnapshot],\\\\n        eligible: list[tuple[str, str, Optional[QuotaSnapshot]]],\\\\n    ) -> str:\\\\n        lines = [\\\\n            f\\\\\\\"Task: {task.title}\\\\\\\",\\\\n            f\\\\\\\"Description: {task.description}\\\\\\\",\\\\n            f\\\\\\\"Complexity: {task.complexity}\\\\\\\",\\\\n            f\\\\\\\"Stage: {stage.stage_type} ({stage.model_role})\\\\\\\",\\\\n            \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\",\\\\n            \\\\\\\"Eligible models:\\\\\\\",\\\\n        ]\\\\n        for model, provider, snapshot in eligible:\\\\n            if snapshot is None:\\\\n                lines.append(f\\\\\\\"- {model} | provider={provider} | account=n/a | remaining=n/a | reset_in=n/a\\\\\\\")\\\\n            else:\\\\n                lines.append(\\\\n                    f\\\\\\\"- {model} | provider={provider} | account={snapshot.email} | \\\\\\\"\\\\n                    f\\\\\\\"remaining={snapshot.remaining_percent}% | reset_in={snapshot.time_until_reset_hours:.1f}h\\\\\\\"\\\\n                )\\\\n        if quotas:\\\\n            lines.extend([\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\"Quota snapshot:\\\\\\\"])\\\\n            for snapshot in quotas:\\\\n                lines.append(\\\\n                    f\\\\\\\"- {snapshot.provider.value}:{snapshot.email} \\\\\\\"\\\\n                    f\\\\\\\"remaining={snapshot.remaining_percent}% reset_in={snapshot.time_until_reset_hours:.1f}h\\\\\\\"\\\\n                )\\\\n        lines.extend(\\\\n            [\\\\n                \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\",\\\\n                \\\\\\\"Prefer use-it-or-lose-it quota, but keep role fit.\\\\\\\",\\\\n                'Respond as JSON: {\\\\\\\"model\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\"...\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\"provider\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\"...\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\"account\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\"...\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\"reason\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\"...\\\\\\\"}',\\\\n            ]\\\\n        )\\\\n        return \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\".join(lines)\\\\n\\\\n    def _score_snapshot(self, snapshot: QuotaSnapshot) -> float:\\\\n        waste_bonus = 0.0\\\\n        if snapshot.time_until_reset_hours <= 6:\\\\n            waste_bonus = snapshot.remaining_percent * (6 - max(snapshot.time_until_reset_hours, 0)) / 6\\\\n        safety_bonus = 15.0 if snapshot.remaining_percent >= 40 else 0.0\\\\n        return snapshot.remaining_percent + waste_bonus + safety_bonus\\\\n\\\\n    def _score_provider_without_snapshot(self, provider: str) -> float:\\\\n        if provider == \\\\\\\"github\\\\\\\":\\\\n            return 85.0\\\\n        if provider == \\\\\\\"claude\\\\\\\":\\\\n            return 70.0\\\\n        return 50.0\\\\n\\\",\\\"exit_code\\\":0,\\\"status\\\":\\\"completed\\\"}}\\n{\\\"type\\\":\\\"item.started\\\",\\\"item\\\":{\\\"id\\\":\\\"item_6\\\",\\\"type\\\":\\\"command_execution\\\",\\\"command\\\":\\\"/bin/bash -lc \\\\\\\"sed -n '1,360p' models/codex/account.py\\\\\\\"\\\",\\\"aggregated_output\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"exit_code\\\":null,\\\"status\\\":\\\"in_progress\\\"}}\\n{\\\"type\\\":\\\"item.completed\\\",\\\"item\\\":{\\\"id\\\":\\\"item_6\\\",\\\"type\\\":\\\"command_execution\\\",\\\"command\\\":\\\"/bin/bash -lc \\\\\\\"sed -n '1,360p' models/codex/account.py\\\\\\\"\\\",\\\"aggregated_output\\\":\\\"from __future__ import annotations\\\\n\\\\nimport json\\\\nimport os\\\\nimport subprocess\\\\nimport time\\\\nfrom dataclasses import dataclass\\\\nfrom pathlib import Path\\\\nfrom typing import Any, Dict, List, Optional\\\\n\\\\nfrom . import auth\\\\n\\\\nCODEX_DIR = Path.home() / \\\\\\\".codex\\\\\\\"\\\\nACCOUNTS_DIR = CODEX_DIR / \\\\\\\"accounts\\\\\\\"\\\\nACCOUNTS_INDEX_PATH = ACCOUNTS_DIR / \\\\\\\"accounts.json\\\\\\\"\\\\nCODEX_AUTH_PATH = CODEX_DIR / \\\\\\\"auth.json\\\\\\\"\\\\n\\\\n\\\\n@dataclass\\\\nclass CodexAccount:\\\\n    email: str\\\\n    access_token: str\\\\n    refresh_token: str\\\\n    id_token: str\\\\n    account_id: str\\\\n    plan_type: str\\\\n    quota_snapshot: Dict[str, Any]\\\\n    disabled: bool\\\\n    created_at: int\\\\n    last_used: int\\\\n\\\\n    def to_dict(self) -> Dict[str, Any]:\\\\n        return {\\\\n            \\\\\\\"email\\\\\\\": self.email,\\\\n            \\\\\\\"access_token\\\\\\\": self.access_token,\\\\n            \\\\\\\"refresh_token\\\\\\\": self.refresh_token,\\\\n            \\\\\\\"id_token\\\\\\\": self.id_token,\\\\n            \\\\\\\"account_id\\\\\\\": self.account_id,\\\\n            \\\\\\\"plan_type\\\\\\\": self.plan_type,\\\\n            \\\\\\\"quota_snapshot\\\\\\\": self.quota_snapshot,\\\\n            \\\\\\\"disabled\\\\\\\": self.disabled,\\\\n            \\\\\\\"created_at\\\\\\\": self.created_at,\\\\n            \\\\\\\"last_used\\\\\\\": self.last_used,\\\\n        }\\\\n\\\\n    @classmethod\\\\n    def from_dict(cls, data: Dict[str, Any]) -> \\\\\\\"CodexAccount\\\\\\\":\\\\n        return cls(\\\\n            email=data.get(\\\\\\\"email\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"),\\\\n            access_token=data.get(\\\\\\\"access_token\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"),\\\\n            refresh_token=data.get(\\\\\\\"refresh_token\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"),\\\\n            id_token=data.get(\\\\\\\"id_token\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"),\\\\n            account_id=data.get(\\\\\\\"account_id\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"),\\\\n            plan_type=data.get(\\\\\\\"plan_type\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\"unknown\\\\\\\"),\\\\n            quota_snapshot=data.get(\\\\\\\"quota_snapshot\\\\\\\") or {},\\\\n            disabled=bool(data.get(\\\\\\\"disabled\\\\\\\", False)),\\\\n            created_at=int(data.get(\\\\\\\"created_at\\\\\\\") or int(time.time())),\\\\n            last_used=int(data.get(\\\\\\\"last_used\\\\\\\") or int(time.time())),\\\\n        )\\\\n\\\\n\\\\n@dataclass\\\\nclass AccountIndex:\\\\n    accounts: List[str]\\\\n    active_account: str\\\\n\\\\n    def to_dict(self) -> Dict[str, Any]:\\\\n        return {\\\\n            \\\\\\\"accounts\\\\\\\": list(self.accounts),\\\\n            \\\\\\\"active_account\\\\\\\": self.active_account,\\\\n        }\\\\n\\\\n    @classmethod\\\\n    def from_dict(cls, data: Dict[str, Any]) -> \\\\\\\"AccountIndex\\\\\\\":\\\\n        accounts = data.get(\\\\\\\"accounts\\\\\\\") or []\\\\n        active = data.get(\\\\\\\"active_account\\\\\\\") or \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\n        return cls(accounts=list(accounts), active_account=active)\\\\n\\\\n\\\\ndef _ensure_accounts_dir() -> None:\\\\n    ACCOUNTS_DIR.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\\\\n\\\\n\\\\ndef _account_path(email: str) -> Path:\\\\n    return ACCOUNTS_DIR / f\\\\\\\"{email}.json\\\\\\\"\\\\n\\\\n\\\\ndef _read_json(path: Path) -> Dict[str, Any]:\\\\n    with path.open(\\\\\\\"r\\\\\\\", encoding=\\\\\\\"utf-8\\\\\\\") as f:\\\\n        return json.load(f)\\\\n\\\\n\\\\ndef _atomic_write_json(path: Path, data: Dict[str, Any]) -> None:\\\\n    _ensure_accounts_dir()\\\\n    tmp_path = path.with_suffix(\\\\\\\".tmp\\\\\\\")\\\\n    with tmp_path.open(\\\\\\\"w\\\\\\\", encoding=\\\\\\\"utf-8\\\\\\\") as f:\\\\n        json.dump(data, f, indent=2, sort_keys=True)\\\\n        f.flush()\\\\n        os.fsync(f.fileno())\\\\n    os.replace(tmp_path, path)\\\\n    os.chmod(path, 0o600)\\\\n\\\\n\\\\ndef _load_index() -> AccountIndex:\\\\n    if not ACCOUNTS_INDEX_PATH.exists():\\\\n        return AccountIndex(accounts=[], active_account=\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\")\\\\n    return AccountIndex.from_dict(_read_json(ACCOUNTS_INDEX_PATH))\\\\n\\\\n\\\\ndef _save_index(index: AccountIndex) -> None:\\\\n    _atomic_write_json(ACCOUNTS_INDEX_PATH, index.to_dict())\\\\n\\\\n\\\\ndef get_account_index() -> AccountIndex:\\\\n    return _load_index()\\\\n\\\\n\\\\ndef get_active_email() -> str:\\\\n    return _load_index().active_account\\\\n\\\\n\\\\ndef list_accounts() -> List[str]:\\\\n    return _load_index().accounts\\\\n\\\\n\\\\ndef load_account(email: str) -> CodexAccount:\\\\n    path = _account_path(email)\\\\n    if not path.exists():\\\\n        raise FileNotFoundError(f\\\\\\\"Account not found: {email}\\\\\\\")\\\\n    return CodexAccount.from_dict(_read_json(path))\\\\n\\\\n\\\\ndef load_all_accounts() -> List[CodexAccount]:\\\\n    index = _load_index()\\\\n    accounts: List[CodexAccount] = []\\\\n    for email in index.accounts:\\\\n        try:\\\\n            accounts.append(load_account(email))\\\\n        except FileNotFoundError:\\\\n            continue\\\\n    return accounts\\\\n\\\\n\\\\ndef save_account(account: CodexAccount) -> None:\\\\n    _atomic_write_json(_account_path(account.email), account.to_dict())\\\\n\\\\n\\\\ndef add_account(\\\\n    email: str,\\\\n    tokens: Dict[str, Any],\\\\n    account_id: Optional[str] = None,\\\\n    plan_type: Optional[str] = None,\\\\n    quota_snapshot: Optional[Dict[str, Any]] = None,\\\\n    disabled: Optional[bool] = None,\\\\n    set_active: bool = False,\\\\n    update_last_used: bool = True,\\\\n) -> CodexAccount:\\\\n    if not tokens.get(\\\\\\\"access_token\\\\\\\") or not tokens.get(\\\\\\\"refresh_token\\\\\\\"):\\\\n        raise RuntimeError(\\\\\\\"Missing access_token or refresh_token for account\\\\\\\")\\\\n\\\\n    now = int(time.time())\\\\n    existing = None\\\\n    try:\\\\n        existing = load_account(email)\\\\n    except FileNotFoundError:\\\\n        pass\\\\n\\\\n    account = CodexAccount(\\\\n        email=email,\\\\n        access_token=tokens.get(\\\\\\\"access_token\\\\\\\") or \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\",\\\\n        refresh_token=tokens.get(\\\\\\\"refresh_token\\\\\\\") or \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\",\\\\n        id_token=tokens.get(\\\\\\\"id_token\\\\\\\") or \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\",\\\\n        account_id=account_id or (existing.account_id if existing else \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"),\\\\n        plan_type=plan_type or (existing.plan_type if existing else \\\\\\\"unknown\\\\\\\"),\\\\n        quota_snapshot=quota_snapshot if quota_snapshot is not None else (existing.quota_snapshot if existing else {}),\\\\n        disabled=existing.disabled if (existing and disabled is None) else bool(disabled),\\\\n        created_at=existing.created_at if existing else now,\\\\n        last_used=now if update_last_used else (existing.last_used if existing else now),\\\\n    )\\\\n\\\\n    save_account(account)\\\\n\\\\n    index = _load_index()\\\\n    if email not in index.accounts:\\\\n        index.accounts.append(email)\\\\n    if set_active:\\\\n        index.active_account = email\\\\n    _save_index(index)\\\\n\\\\n    return account\\\\n\\\\n\\\\ndef get_active_account() -> CodexAccount:\\\\n    index = _load_index()\\\\n    if not index.active_account:\\\\n        raise RuntimeError(\\\\\\\"No active account set\\\\\\\")\\\\n    return load_account(index.active_account)\\\\n\\\\n\\\\ndef remove_account(email: str) -> None:\\\\n    index = _load_index()\\\\n    if email in index.accounts:\\\\n        index.accounts.remove(email)\\\\n    if index.active_account == email:\\\\n        index.active_account = \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\n    _save_index(index)\\\\n\\\\n    path = _account_path(email)\\\\n    if path.exists():\\\\n        path.unlink()\\\\n\\\\n\\\\ndef import_current_account() -> CodexAccount:\\\\n    auth_data = auth.read_codex_auth()\\\\n    tokens = auth_data.get(\\\\\\\"tokens\\\\\\\", {})\\\\n    if not tokens.get(\\\\\\\"access_token\\\\\\\") or not tokens.get(\\\\\\\"refresh_token\\\\\\\"):\\\\n        raise RuntimeError(\\\\\\\"Current auth.json is missing access_token or refresh_token\\\\\\\")\\\\n    info = auth.extract_account_info(tokens.get(\\\\\\\"id_token\\\\\\\"), tokens.get(\\\\\\\"access_token\\\\\\\"))\\\\n\\\\n    email = info.email\\\\n    if not )\\\\n\\\\n    return account\\\\n\\\\n\\\\ndef _is_codex_running() -> bool:\\\\n    try:\\\\n        result = subprocess.run(\\\\n            [\\\\\\\"pgrep\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\"-f\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\"codex\\\\\\\"],\\\\n            check=False,\\\\n            stdout=subprocess.DEVNULL,\\\\n            stderr=subprocess.DEVNULL,\\\\n        )\\\\n        return result.returncode == 0\\\\n    except FileNotFoundError:\\\\n        return False\\\\n\\\\n\\\\ndef refresh_account_tokens(account: CodexAccount, force: bool = False) -> CodexAccount:\\\\n    tokens = {\\\\n        \\\\\\\"access_token\\\\\\\": account.access_token,\\\\n        \\\\\\\"refresh_token\\\\\\\": account.refresh_token,\\\\n        \\\\\\\"id_token\\\\\\\": account.id_token,\\\\n        \\\\\\\"account_id\\\\\\\": account.account_id,\\\\n    }\\\\n\\\\n    try:\\\\n        new_tokens = auth.ensure_fresh_tokens(tokens, force=force)\\\\n    except auth.AuthError as exc:\\\\n tokens:\\\\n        info = auth.extract_account_info(new_tokens.get(\\\\\\\"id_token\\\\\\\"), new_tokens.get(\\\\\\\"access_token\\\\\\\"))\\\\n        if info.account_id:\\\\n            account.account_id = info.account_id\\\\n        if info.plan_type:\\\\n            account.plan_type = info.plan_type\\\\n\\\\n        account.access_token = new_tokens.get(\\\\\\\"access_token\\\\\\\") or account.access_token\\\\n        account.refresh_token = new_tokens.get(\\\\\\\"refresh_token\\\\\\\") or account.refresh_token\\\\n        account.id_token = new_tokens.get(\\\\\\\"id_token\\\\\\\") or account.id_token\\\\n        account.last_used = int(time.time())\\\\n        save_account(account)\\\\n\\\\n    return account\\\\n\\\\n\\\\ndef set_active_account(email: str) -> CodexAccount:\\\\n    index = _load_index()\\\\n    if email not in index.accounts:\\\\n        raise RuntimeError(f\\\\\\\"Account not found: {email}\\\\\\\")\\\\n\\\\n    if _is_codex_running():\\\\n        print(\\\\\\\"Warning: codex appears to be running; restart it after switching.\\\\\\\")\\\\n\\\\n    try:\\\\n self.executor.run_verify_cmd(task.verify_cmd, task.working_dir)\\\\n            if verification.returncode != 0:\\\\n                self.task_queue.update_task_status(task.task_id, TaskStatus.FAILED)\\\\n                return\\\\n        self.task_queue.update_task_status(task.task_id, TaskStatus.DONE)\\\\n\\\\n\\\\ndef build_parser() -> argparse.ArgumentParser:\\\\n    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(description=\\\\\\\"Autonomous multi-LLM harness\\\\\\\")\\\\n    subparsers = parser.add_subparsers(dest=\\\\\\\"command\\\\\\\", required=True)\\\\n\\\\n    submit = subparsers.add_parser(\\\\\\\"submit\\\\\\\", help=\\\\\\\"Submit a task into the harness queue\\\\\\\")\\\\n    submit.add_argument(\\\\\\\"description\\\\\\\", help=\\\\\\\"Task description\\\\\\\")\\\\n    submit.add_argument(\\\\\\\"--title\\\\\\\", help=\\\\\\\"Override generated title\\\\\\\")\\\\n    submit.add_argument(\\\\\\\"--goal\\\\\\\", help=\\\\\\\"Acceptance goal\\\\\\\")\\\\n    submit.add_argument(\\\\\\\"--verify-cmd\\\\\\\", help=\\\\\\\"Verification command\\\\\\\")\\\\n    submit.add_argument(\\\\\\\"--priority\\\\\\\", type=int, default=50)\\\\n    submit.add_argument(\\\\\\\"--working-dir\\\\\\\", help=\\\\\\\"Task working directory\\\\\\\")\\\\n\\\\n    chat = subparsers.add_parser(\\\\\\\"chat\\\\\\\", help=\\\\\\\"Interactive requirement clarification\\\\\\\")\\\\n    chat.add_argument(\\\\\\\"description\\\\\\\", nargs=\\\\\\\"?\\\\\\\", help=\\\\\\\"Initial task description\\\\\\\")\\\\n    chat.add_argument(\\\\\\\"--priority\\\\\\\", type=int, default=50)\\\\n    chat.add_argument(\\\\\\\"--working-dir\\\\\\\", help=\\\\\\\"Task working directory\\\\\\\")\\\\n\\\\n    inspect = subparsers.add_parser(\\\\\\\"inspect\\\\\\\", help=\\\\\\\"Show a task in detail\\\\\\\")\\\\n    inspect.add_argument(\\\\\\\"task_id\\\\\\\")\\\\n\\\\n    pause = subparsers.add_parser(\\\\\\\"pause\\\\\\\", help=\\\\\\\"Pause a task\\\\\\\")\\\\n    pause.add_argument(\\\\\\\"task_id\\\\\\\")\\\\n\\\\n    resume = subparsers.add_parser(\\\\\\\"resume\\\\\\\", help=\\\\\\\"Resume a task\\\\\\\")\\\\n    resume.add_argument(\\\\\\\"task_id\\\\\\\")\\\\n\\\\n    subparsers.add_parser(\\\\\\\"quota\\\\\\\", help=\\\\\\\"Show quota snapshot\\\\\\\")\\\\n    subparsers.add_parser(\\\\\\\"run-once\\\\\\\", help=\\\\\\\"Run one scheduling iteration\\\\\\\")\\\\n    subparsers.add_parser(\\\\\\\"status\\\\\\\", help=\\\\\\\"Show queued tasks\\\\\\\")\\\\n    return parser\\\\n\\\\n\\\\nasync def _prompt_user_approval(command: str, context: str) -> bool | None:\\\\n    if not sys.stdin.isatty():\\\\n        return None\\\\n    print(f\\\\\\\"Permission request for command: {command}\\\\\\\")\\\\n    if context:\\\\n        print(f\\\\\\\"Context: {context}\\\\\\\")\\\\n    answer = await asyncio.to_thread(input, \\\\\\\"Allow? [y/N]: \\\\\\\")\\\\n    lowered = answer.strip().lower()\\\\n    if lowered in {\\\\\\\"y\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\"yes\\\\\\\"}:\\\\n        return True\\\\n    if lowered in {\\\\\\\"n\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\"no\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"}:\\\\n        return False\\\\n    return None\\\\n\\\\n\\\\ndef build_cli_harness() -> Harness:\\\\n    chat_client = None\\\\n    permission_gate = PermissionGate(user_approver=_prompt_user_approval)\\\\n    stage_executor = StageExecutor(chat_client=chat_client, permission_gate=permission_gate)\\\\n    quota_router = QuotaRouter(chat_client=stage_executor.chat_client)\\\\n    return Harness(quota_router=quota_router, stage_executor=stage_executor)\\\\n\\\\n\\\\ndef _read_multiline_description() -> str:\\\\n    print(\\\\\\\"Describe the task. Press Enter twice to finish:\\\\\\\")\\\\n    lines: list[str] = []\\\\n    while True:\\\\n        line = input()\\\\n        if not line and (not lines or not lines[-1]):\\\\n            break\\\\n        lines.append(line)\\\\n    return \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\".join(lines).strip()\\\\n\\\\n\\\\ndef _run_chat_submission(harness: Harness, description: str | None, priority: int, working_dir: str | None) -> TaskRecord:\\\\n    initial_description = description or _read_multiline_description()\\\\n    if not initial_description:\\\\n        raise ValueError(\\\\\\\"Task description cannot be empty.\\\\\\\")\\\\n\\\\n    base = harness.intake.plan_task(initial_description)\\\\n    questions = harness.intake.generate_questions(initial_description, base.complexity)\\\\n    answers: dict[str, str] = {}\\\\n    for question in questions:\\\\n        suffix = f\\\\\\\" [{question.default}]\\\\\\\" if question.default else \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\n        response = input(f\\\\\\\"{question.prompt}{suffix}: \\\\\\\").strip()\\\\n        answers[question.key] = response or (question.default or \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\")\\\\n\\\\n    intake = harness.intake.apply_answers(initial_description, answers)\\\\n    return harness.submit_intake(intake, priority=priority, working_dir=working_dir)\\\\n\\\\n\\\\nasync def _main_async(args: argparse.Namespace) -> int:\\\\n    harness = build_cli_harness()\\\\n    if args.command == \\\\\\\"submit\\\\\\\":\\\\n        task = harness.submit_task(\\\\n            args.description,\\\\n            title=args.title,\\\\n            goal=args.goal,\\\\n            verify_cmd=args.verify_cmd,\\\\n            priority=args.priority,\\\\n            working_dir=args.working_dir,\\\\n        )\\\\n        print(task.task_id)\\\\n        return 0\\\\n    if args.command == \\\\\\\"chat\\\\\\\":\\\\n        task = _run_chat_submission(harness, args.description, args.priority, args.working_dir)\\\\n        print(json.dumps({\\\\\\\"task_id\\\\\\\": task.task_id, \\\\\\\"title\\\\\\\": task.title}, ensure_ascii=False))\\\\n        return 0\\\\n    if args.command == \\\\\\\"run-once\\\\\\\":\\\\n        task = await harness.run_once()\\\\n        print(task.task_id if task else \\\\\\\"idle\\\\\\\")\\\\n        return 0\\\\n    if args.command == \\\\\\\"status\\\\\\\":\\\\n        for item in harness.status_report():\\\\n            print(json.dumps(item, ensure_ascii=False))\\\\n        return 0\\\\n    if args.command == \\\\\\\"inspect\\\\\\\":\\\\n        print(json.dumps(harness.inspect_task(args.task_id), ensure_ascii=False, indent=2))\\\\n        return 0\\\\n    if args.command == \\\\\\\"pause\\\\\\\":\\\\n        harness.pause_task(args.task_id)\\\\n        print(args.task_id)\\\\n        return 0\\\\n    if args.command == \\\\\\\"resume\\\\\\\":\\\\n        harness.resume_task(args.task_id)\\\\n        print(args.task_id)\\\\n        return 0\\\\n    if args.command == \\\\\\\"quota\\\\\\\":\\\\n        for item in harness.quota_report():\\\\n            print(json.dumps(item, ensure_ascii=False))\\\\n        return 0\\\\n    return 1\\\\n\\\\n\\\\ndef main() -> None:\\\\n    parser = build_parser()\\\\n    args = parser.parse_args()\\\\n    raise SystemExit(asyncio.run(_main_async(args)))\\\\n\\\\n\\\\nif __name__ == \\\\\\\"__main__\\\\\\\":\\\\n    main()\\\\n\\\",\\\"exit_code\\\":0,\\\"status\\\":\\\"completed\\\"}}\\n{\\\"type\\\":\\\"item.started\\\",\\\"item\\\":{\\\"id\\\":\\\"item_9\\\",\\\"type\\\":\\\"command_execution\\\",\\\"command\\\":\\\"/bin/bash models/quota_manager.py\\\\\\\"\\\",\\\"aggregated_output\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"exit_code\\\":null,\\\"status\\\":\\\"in_progress\\\"}}\\n{\\\"type\\\":\\\"item.completed\\\",\\\"item\\\":{\\\"id\\\":\\\"item_9\\\",\\\"type\\\":\\\"command_execution\\\",\\\"command\\\":\\\"/bin/bash -lc \\\\\\\"sed -n '1,320p' models/quota_manager.py\\\\\\\"\\\",\\\"aggregated_output\\\":\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\nUnified Quota Manager for Google (Antigravity) and Codex accounts.\\\\n\\\\nSmart switching algorithm \\u2014 optimizes for:\\\\n1. WASTE PREVENTION: Use quota before it expires (don't let resets waste unused quota)\\\\n2. TASK SAFETY: Ensure >40% remaining when starting new tasks\\\\n3. CONTINUITY: Avoid unnecessary switching (anti-thrash)\\\\n\\\\nUnified scoring formula per account:\\\\n  score = remaining + waste_urgency + safety_bonus + inertia\\\\n\\\\nWhere:\\\\n  - remaining: current remaining % (0-100)\\\\n  - waste_urgency: remaining \\u00d7 (WASTE_WINDOW - hours_to_reset) / WASTE_WINDOW\\\\n    \\u2192 Boosts accounts with quota about to be lost on reset\\\\n  - safety_bonus: +15 if remaining > 40% (enough for a full task)\\\\n  - inertia: +5 for current account (avoid switching for marginal gains)\\\\n\\\\nSwitch when best candidate's score exceeds current by > 10 points.\\\\n\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\n\\\\nfrom __future__ import annotations\\\\n\\\\nimport json\\\\nimport time\\\\nfrom dataclasses import dataclass, field\\\\nfrom datetime import datetime, timedelta\\\\nfrom enum import Enum\\\\nfrom pathlib import Path\\\\nfrom typing import Any, Optional\\\\n\\\\nfrom models.codex.account import load_account as load_codex_account\\\\nfrom models.codex.account import list_accounts as list_codex_accounts\\\\nfrom models.codex.account import set_active_account as set_active_codex_account\\\\nfrom models.codex.account import get_active_email as get_active_codex_email\\\\nfrom models.codex.quota import fetch_quota as fetch_codex_quota\\\\nfrom models.google.account import load_account as load_google_account\\\\nfrom models.google.account import list_accounts as list_google_accounts_fn\\\\nfrom models.google.account import set_active_account as set_active_google_account\\\\nfrom models.google.account import get_active_email as get_active_google_email\\\\nfrom models.google.account import save_account as save_google_account\\\\nfrom models.google.oauth import ensure_fresh_token as ensure_fresh_google_token\\\\nfrom models.google.quota import fetch_account_quota as fetch_google_quota\\\\n\\\\n\\\\nclass Provider(str, Enum):\\\\n    CODEX = \\\\\\\"codex\\\\\\\"\\\\n    GOOGLE = \\\\\\\"google\\\\\\\"\\\\n\\\\n\\\\n@dataclass\\\\nclass QuotaSnapshot:\\\\n    \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"Point-in-time quota snapshot for an account.\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\n    provider: Provider\\\\n    email: str\\\\n    account_id: str\\\\n    plan_type: str\\\\n    used_percent: int\\\\n    reset_at: int                    # Unix timestamp\\\\n    reset_at_readable: str           # Human-readable\\\\n    time_until_reset_hours: float\\\\n\\\\n    @property\\\\n    def remaining_percent(self) -> int:\\\\n        return max(0, 100 - self.used_percent)\\\\n\\\\n    @property\\\\n    def is_exhausted(self) -> bool:\\\\n        \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"True if quota is essentially depleted (>= 95%).\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\n        return self.used_percent >= 95\\\\n\\\\n    @property\\\\n    def is_fresh(self) -> bool:\\\\n        \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"True if just reset or will reset very soon.\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\n        return self.remaining_percent >= 90 or self.time_until_reset_hours < 0.5\\\\n\\\\n    def __str__(self) -> str:\\\\n        return (\\\\n            f\\\\\\\"{self.email:<40} {self.plan_type:<6} \\\\\\\"\\\\n            f\\\\\\\"[{self.used_percent:>3}%] \\\\\\\"\\\\n            f\\\\\\\"{self.time_until_reset_hours:>5.1f}h\\\\\\\"\\\\n        )\\\\n\\\\n\\\\n@dataclass\\\\nclass SwitchDecision:\\\\n    \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"Result of quota analysis and switching decision.\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\n    should_switch: bool\\\\n    reason: str\\\\n    target_email: Optional[str]\\\\n    target_remaining: Optional[int]\\\\n    current_email: Optional[str]\\\\n    current_remaining: Optional[int]\\\\n\\\\n    def __str__(self) -> str:\\\\n        if not self.should_switch:\\\\n            return f\\\\\\\"STAY on {self.current_email} ({self.current_remaining}% remaining) - {self.reason}\\\\\\\"\\\\n        return (\\\\n            f\\\\\\\"SWITCH {self.current_email} \\u2192 {self.target_email} \\\\\\\"\\\\n            f\\\\\\\"({self.current_remaining}% \\u2192 {self.target_remaining}%) - {self.reason}\\\\\\\"\\\\n        )\\\\n\\\\n\\\\nclass QuotaManager:\\\\n    \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\n    Intelligent quota manager for multi-provider, multi-account systems.\\\\n\\\\n    Optimizes for three goals (in priority order):\\\\n    1. WASTE PREVENTION \\u2014 Use quota before it resets (don't lose unused quota)\\\\n    2. TASK SAFETY \\u2014 Prefer accounts with >40% for new tasks\\\\n    3. CONTINUITY \\u2014 Avoid unnecessary mid-session switching\\\\n\\\\n    Uses a unified scoring formula:\\\\n      score = remaining + waste_urgency + safety_bonus + inertia\\\\n    \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\n\\\\n    TASK_SAFETY_THRESHOLD = 40              # Prefer accounts > 40% for new tasks\\\\n    FRESH_QUOTA_THRESHOLD = 90              # Consider \\\\\\\"fresh\\\\\\\" if >= 90%\\\\n    WASTE_WINDOW_HOURS = 6                  # Boost accounts resetting within 6h\\\\n    SAFETY_BONUS = 15                       # Score bonus for accounts > 40%\\\\n    INERTIA_BONUS = 5                       # Score bonus for staying on current\\\\n    HEALTHY_INERTIA = 20                    # Extra inertia when current is healthy (>40%)\\\\n    SWITCH_THRESHOLD = 10                   # Minimum score improvement to switch\\\\n\\\\n    def __init__(self, check_interval_minutes: int = 60):\\\\n        self.check_interval_minutes = check_interval_minutes\\\\n        self.last_check_time = 0\\\\n        self.account_reset_times: dict[str, int] = {}  # email -> reset_at timestamp\\\\n        self.last_switch_time = 0\\\\n        self.state_file = Path.home() / \\\\\\\".codex\\\\\\\" / \\\\\\\"quota_manager_state.json\\\\\\\"\\\\n        self._load_state()\\\\n\\\\n    def _load_state(self) -> None:\\\\n        \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"Load persistent state (reset times).\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\n        if self.state_file.exists():\\\\n            try:\\\\n                with open(self.state_file) as f:\\\\n                    data = json.load(f)\\\\n                self.account_reset_times = {k: int(v) for k, v in data.get(\\\\\\\"reset_times\\\\\\\", {}).items()}\\\\n            except Exception:\\\\n                self.account_reset_times = {}\\\\n\\\\n    def _save_state(self) -> None:\\\\n        \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"Save persistent state.\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\n        self.state_file.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\\\\n        with open(self.state_file, \\\\\\\"w\\\\\\\") as f:\\\\n            json.dump(\\\\n                {\\\\\\\"reset_times\\\\\\\": self.account_reset_times},\\\\n                f,\\\\n                indent=2,\\\\n            )\\\\n\\\\n    def fetch_all_quotas(self) -> list[QuotaSnapshot]:\\\\n        \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"Fetch quota for all accounts (both providers).\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\n        snapshots: list[QuotaSnapshot] = []\\\\n        now = int(time.time())\\\\n\\\\n        # Codex accounts\\\\n        try:\\\\n            for email in list_codex_accounts():\\\\n                try:\\\\n                    account = load_codex_account(email)\\\\n                    quota = fetch_codex_quota(account.access_token, account.account_id)\\\\n                    reset_at = quota.weekly_reset_at\\\\n                    time_until_reset = (reset_at - now) / 3600.0  # hours\\\\n\\\\n                    snapshot = QuotaSnapshot(\\\\n                        provider=Provider.CODEX,\\\\n                        email=account.email,\\\\n                        account_id=account.account_id,\\\\n                        plan_type=quota.plan_type or \\\\\\\"unknown\\\\\\\",\\\\n                        used_percent=quota.weekly_used_percent,\\\\n                        reset_at=reset_at,\\\\n                        reset_at_readable=datetime.fromtimestamp(reset_at).strftime(\\\\\\\"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M\\\\\\\"),\\\\n                        time_until_reset_hours=time_until_reset,\\\\n                    )\\\\n                    snapshots.append(snapshot)\\\\n                    self.account_reset_times[account.email] = reset_at\\\\n                except Exception as e:\\\\n                    print(f\\\\\\\"Warning: failed to fetch Codex quota for {email}: {e}\\\\\\\")\\\\n        except Exception as e:\\\\n            print(f\\\\\\\"Warning: failed to load Codex accounts: {e}\\\\\\\")\\\\n\\\\n        # Google accounts\\\\n        try:\\\\n            accounts = list_google_accounts_fn()\\\\n            # Google's list_accounts returns Account objects directly\\\\n            for account in accounts:\\\\n                try:\\\\n                    # Refresh token if expired\\\\n                    account.token = ensure_fresh_google_token(account.token)\\\\n                    save_google_account(account)\\\\n                    quota, _ = fetch_google_quota(account.token.access_token, account.project_id)\\\\n                    # Google quotas are per-model, find the max usage\\\\n                    max_used_percent = 0\\\\n                    max_reset_at = 0\\\\n                    for model_quota in quota.models:\\\\n                        used = 100 - (model_quota.percentage or 0)\\\\n                        if used > max_used_percent:\\\\n                            max_used_percent = used\\\\n                        if model_quota.reset_time:\\\\n                            try:\\\\n                                reset_ts = int(datetime.fromisoformat(\\\\n                                    model_quota.reset_time.replace(\\\\\\\"Z\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\"+00:00\\\\\\\")\\\\n                                ).timestamp())\\\\n                                if reset_ts > max_reset_at:\\\\n                                    max_reset_at = reset_ts\\\\n                            except Exception:\\\\n                                pass\\\\n\\\\n                    if max_reset_at == 0:\\\\n                        max_reset_at = now + 86400  # Default 24h if unknown\\\\n\\\\n                    time_until_reset = (max_reset_at - now) / 3600.0\\\\n\\\\n                    snapshot = QuotaSnapshot(\\\\n                        provider=Provider.GOOGLE,\\\\n                        email=account.email,\\\\n                        account_id=account.project_id or \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\",\\\\n                        plan_type=quota.subscription_tier or \\\\\\\"unknown\\\\\\\",\\\\n                        used_percent=max_used_percent,\\\\n                        reset_at=max_reset_at,\\\\n                        reset_at_readable=datetime.fromtimestamp(max_reset_at).strftime(\\\\\\\"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M\\\\\\\"),\\\\n                        time_until_reset_hours=time_until_reset,\\\\n                    )\\\\n                    snapshots.append(snapshot)\\\\n                    self.account_reset_times[account.email] = max_reset_at\\\\n                except Exception as e:\\\\n                    print(f\\\\\\\"Warning: failed to fetch Google quota for {account.email}: {e}\\\\\\\")\\\\n        except Exception as e:\\\\n            print(f\\\\\\\"Warning: failed to load Google accounts: {e}\\\\\\\")\\\\n\\\\n        self._save_state()\\\\n        return sorted(snapshots, key=lambda s: (-s.remaining_percent, s.time_until_reset_hours))\\\\n\\\\n    def _score_account(self, snapshot: QuotaSnapshot, is_current: bool = False) -> float:\\\\n        \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\n        Unified scoring formula for an account.\\\\n\\\\n        score = remaining + waste_urgency + safety_bonus + inertia\\\\n\\\\n        Components:\\\\n        - remaining: base value (0-100)\\\\n        - waste_urgency: boosts accounts with quota about to expire\\\\n          = remaining \\u00d7 (WASTE_WINDOW - hours_to_reset) / WASTE_WINDOW\\\\n          Only applies when hours_to_reset < WASTE_WINDOW\\\\n        - safety_bonus: +15 for accounts with >40% (can sustain a full task)\\\\n        - inertia: +5 for current account (anti-thrash)\\\\n\\\\n        Examples:\\\\n        - Account A: 50% remaining, 2h until reset, current\\\\n          \\u2192 50 + 50*(6-2)/6 + 15 + 5 = 50 + 33.3 + 15 + 5 = 103.3\\\\n        - Account B: 80% remaining, 120h until reset, not current\\\\n          \\u2192 80 + 0 + 15 + 0 = 95\\\\n        - Account C: 20% remaining, 1h until reset, not current\\\\n          \\u2192 20 + 20*(6-1)/6 + 0 + 0 = 20 + 16.7 + 0 = 36.7\\\\n        \\u2192 Switch to A (use its 50% before reset), even though B has more remaining\\\\n        \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\n        remaining = snapshot.remaining_percent\\\\n\\\\n        # Waste urgency: boost accounts with quota about to be lost on reset\\\\n        waste_urgency = 0.0\\\\n        hours = snapshot.time_until_reset_hours\\\\n        if 0 < hours <= self.WASTE_WINDOW_HOURS and remaining > 0:\\\\n            waste_urgency = remaining * (self.WASTE_WINDOW_HOURS - hours) / self.WASTE_WINDOW_HOURS\\\\n\\\\n        # Safety bonus: prefer accounts that can sustain a full task\\\\n        safety = self.SAFETY_BONUS if remaining > self.TASK_SAFETY_THRESHOLD else 0\\\\n\\\\n        # Inertia: preference for staying on current account\\\\n        # Extra inertia when healthy \\u2014 don't switch between two good accounts\\\\n        inertia = 0\\\\n        if is_current:\\\\n            inertia = self.INERTIA_BONUS\\\\n            if remaining > self.TASK_SAFETY_THRESHOLD:\\\\n                inertia += self.HEALTHY_INERTIA\\\\n\\\\n        return remaining + waste_urgency + safety + inertia\\\\n\\\\n    def _is_fresh_reset(self, snapshot: QuotaSnapshot) -> bool:\\\\n        \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"Check if account just reset or is in immediate post-reset window.\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\n        return snapshot.remaining_percent >= self.FRESH_QUOTA_THRESHOLD\\\\n\\\\n    def analyze_and_decide(\\\\n        self,\\\\n        current_email: str,\\\\n        current_snapshot: Optional[QuotaSnapshot],\\\\n        all_snapshots: list[QuotaSnapshot],\\\\n    ) -> SwitchDecision:\\\\n        \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\n        Analyze quota situation and decide whether to switch accounts.\\\\n\\\\n        Uses unified scoring that balances:\\\\n        1. Waste prevention (use expiring quota before it's lost)\\\\n        2. Task safety (prefer >40% for new tasks)\\\\n        3. Continuity (inertia for current account)\\\\n        \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\n        if not current_snapshot:\\\\n            # No current account info \\u2014 pick the best available\\\\n            if all_snapshots:\\\\n                scored = [(s, self._score_account(s)) for s in all_snapshots]\\\\n                best, best_score = max(scored, key=lambda x: x[1])\\\\n                return SwitchDecision(\\\\n                    should_switch=True,\\\\n                    reason=f\\\\\\\"No current account \\u2014 selecting best (score {best_score:.0f})\\\\\\\",\\\\n                    target_email=best.email,\\\\n                    target_remaining=best.remaining_percent,\\\\n                    current_email=current_email,\\\\n                    current_remaining=None,\\\\n                )\\\\n            return SwitchDecision(\\\\n                should_switch=False,\\\\n                reason=\\\\\\\"No account quota available\\\\\\\",\\\\n                target_email=None,\\\\n                target_remaining=None,\\\\n                current_email=current_email,\\\\n                current_remaining=None,\\\\n            )\\\\n\\\\n        # Score current account\\\\n\\\",\\\"exit_code\\\":0,\\\"status\\\":\\\"completed\\\"}}\\n{\\\"type\\\":\\\"item.started\\\",\\\"item\\\":{\\\"id\\\":\\\"item_10\\\",\\\"type\\\":\\\"command_execution\\\",\\\"command\\\":\\\"/bin/bash
