\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"/bin/bash -lc \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"sed -n '1,220p' artifacts/563b7352a8d94c82bf26787efb827fc0/01_plan_output.md\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"aggregated_output\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"# Output: plan\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n## Summary\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nImplement the robustness work in three slices with tests after each slice:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n1. Codex account rotation\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n- Keep `QuotaRouter.select_model()` side-effect free so `can_run_stage()` remains safe.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n- Extend routing to choose the best Codex account among all Codex quota snapshots using the existing use-it-or-lose-it scoring, and preserve the chosen `account_email` in `ModelChoice`.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n- Add a separate activation step before Codex execution that calls `models.codex.account.set_active_account()` only when the chosen Codex account differs from the current active account.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n- Log/surface the selected account in the routing reason and stage telemetry.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n2. Daemon lifecycle\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n- Add a small daemon manager module instead of embedding process control directly in CLI branches.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n- Use a detached `subprocess.Popen(..., start_new_session=True)` worker for a portable nohup-style background process.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n- Add `daemon start`, `daemon stop`, and `daemon status` CLI subcommands plus a hidden worker command that runs `Harness.run_forever()`.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n- Persist daemon metadata in a PID file, detect stale PID files, and install a `SIGTERM` handler that lets the current iteration finish and exits cleanly.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n3. Logging, monitoring, and dashboard\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n- Add one centralized logging setup for the harness CLI/daemon path.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n- Emit structured JSONL events for stage start, completion, retry, quota pause, permission pause, and failure.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n- Compute dashboard aggregates from the DB plus the JSONL event stream: task counts by status, stage counts by status, total/average duration, total token usage, and execution error rate.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n- Include daemon state, recent failures, and quota/permission pause counts in the dashboard output.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n## File Targets\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n- `harness/quota_router.py`\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n- `harness/main.py`\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n- `harness/stage_executor.py`\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n- `harness/task_queue.py`\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n- `config/settings.py`\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n- New modules are likely justified for daemon/process management and telemetry aggregation.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n## Test Plan\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n- Add router tests for multi-account Codex selection and no-side-effect feasibility checks.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n- Add harness/main tests for Codex account activation before execution.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n- Add daemon tests for PID lifecycle, stale PID detection, and stop/status behavior.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n- Add telemetry/dashboard tests for JSONL event emission and aggregate summaries.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n- Final verification: `python3 -m pytest tests/harness/ -v`\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n## Baseline\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nCurrent baseline is green: `python3 -m pytest tests/harness/ routing.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nfrom typing import Any, Optional\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nimport yaml\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nfrom config import QuotaSnapshot\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nclass AllQuotaExhaustedError(RuntimeError):\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n when no configured candidate model is currently usable.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nclass QuotaRouter:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Select a model using role preferences, availability, and quota heuristics.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def __init__(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        self,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        catalog_path: str | Path = settings.HARNESS_ROLE_MODELS_PATH,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        *,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        quota_manager: Optional[QuotaManager] = None,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        chat_client: Optional[Chat2APIClient] = None,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        min_remaining_pct: int = settings.HARNESS_MIN_QUOTA_PCT,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        enable_llm_selector: bool = True,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    ) -> None:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        self.catalog_path = Path(catalog_path)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        self.quota_manager = quota_manager or QuotaManager()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        self.chat_client = chat_client or Chat2APIClient()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        self.min_remaining_pct = min_remaining_pct\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        self.enable_llm_selector = enable_llm_selector\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        self.catalog = self._load_catalog()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def _load_catalog(self) -> dict[str, Any]:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        with open(self.catalog_path, \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"r\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", encoding=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"utf-8\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\") as handle:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            return yaml.safe_load(handle) or {}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def models_for_role(self, role: str) -> list[str]:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        roles = self.catalog.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"roles\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", {})\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        configured = roles.get(role)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        if configured:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            return list(configured)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return list(self.catalog.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"models\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", {}).keys())\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def get_model_info(self, model: str) -> dict[str, Any]:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return dict(self.catalog.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"models\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", {}).get(model, {}))\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def chat2api_id(self, model: str) -> str:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Return the chat2api model ID for a catalog model name.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        info = self.get_model_info(model)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return info.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"chat2api_id\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", model)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def list_available_models(self) -> list[str]:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Return catalog model names whose chat2api_id is live.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        try:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            live_ids = set(self.chat_client.list_models())\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        except Exception:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            return list(self.catalog.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"models\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", {}).keys())\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        if not live_ids:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            return list(self.catalog.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"models\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", {}).keys())\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return [\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            name\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            for name in self.catalog.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"models\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", {})\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            if self.chat2api_id(name) in live_ids\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        ]\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def can_run_stage(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        self,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        task: TaskRecord,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        stage: StageRecord,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        *,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        quota_snapshot: Optional[list[QuotaSnapshot]] = None,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        available_models: Optional[list[str]] = None,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    ) -> bool:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        try:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            self.select_model(task, stage, quota_snapshot=quota_snapshot, available_models=available_models)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        except AllQuotaExhaustedError:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            return False\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return True\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def select_model(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        self,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        task: TaskRecord,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        stage: StageRecord,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        *,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        quota_snapshot: Optional[list[QuotaSnapshot]] = None,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        available_models: Optional[list[str]] = None,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    ) -> ModelChoice:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        quotas = quota_snapshot if quota_snapshot is not None else self.quota_manager.fetch_all_quotas()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        available = set(available_models or self.list_available_models())\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        eligible = self._eligible_candidates(self.models_for_role(stage.model_role), quotas, available)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        if not eligible:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            raise AllQuotaExhaustedError(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"No eligible model for role={stage.model_role} with min_remaining={self.min_remaining_pct}%\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            )\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        if self.enable_llm_selector:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            llm_choice = self._select_with_llm(task, stage, quotas, eligible)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            if llm_choice is not None:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                return llm_choice\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return self._fallback_select(task, stage, eligible)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def _eligible_candidates(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        self,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        candidates: list[str],\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        quotas: list[QuotaSnapshot],\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        available: set[str],\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    ) -> list[tuple[str, str, Optional[QuotaSnapshot]]]:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        eligible: list[tuple[str, str, Optional[QuotaSnapshot]]] = []\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        for model in candidates:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            if model not in available:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                continue\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            provider = self.get_model_info(model).get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"provider\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            if not provider:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                continue\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            provider_snapshots = [\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                snapshot\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                for snapshot in quotas\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                if snapshot.provider.value == provider and snapshot.remaining_percent >= self.min_remaining_pct\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            ]\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            if provider_snapshots:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                eligible.append((model, provider, max(provider_snapshots, key=self._score_snapshot)))\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            elif provider == \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"github\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                eligible.append((model, provider, None))\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return eligible\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def _select_with_llm(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        self,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        task: TaskRecord,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        stage: StageRecord,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        quotas: list[QuotaSnapshot],\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        eligible: list[tuple[str, str, Optional[QuotaSnapshot]]],\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    ) -> ModelChoice | None:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        selector_model = self._pick_selector_model()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        if selector_model is None:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            return None\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        prompt = self._build_selection_prompt(task, stage, quotas, eligible)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        try:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            raw = self.chat_client.chat(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                model=selector_model,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                prompt=prompt,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                system=(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"You are code-orchestra's model router. \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Return compact JSON with fields model, provider, account, reason.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                ),\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            )\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            parsed = json.loads(raw)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        except Exception:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            return None\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        chosen_model = parsed.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"model\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        if not isinstance(chosen_model, str):\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            return None\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        eligible_models = {model: (provider, snapshot) for model, provider, snapshot in eligible}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        selected = eligible_models.get(chosen_model)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        if selected is None:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            return None\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        provider, snapshot = selected\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        if snapshot is not None:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            requested_account = parsed.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"account\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            if isinstance(requested_account, str) and requested_account and requested_account != snapshot.email:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                alternative = next(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    (\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                        quota\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                        for quota in quotas\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                        if quota.provider.value == provider\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                        and quota.email == requested_account\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                        and quota.remaining_percent >= self.min_remaining_pct\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    ),\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    None,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                )\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                if alternative is not None:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    snapshot = alternative\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return ModelChoice(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            model=chosen_model,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            provider=provider,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            account_email=snapshot.email if snapshot is not None else None,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            reason=str(parsed.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"reason\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\") or \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"llm_selector\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"),\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        )\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def _fallback_select(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        self,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        task: TaskRecord,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        stage: StageRecord,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        eligible: list[tuple[str, str, Optional[QuotaSnapshot]]],\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    ) -> ModelChoice:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        best_choice: ModelChoice | None = None\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        best_score: float | None = None\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        for role_index, (model, provider, snapshot) in enumerate(eligible):\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            role_bonus = max(0, 40 - role_index * 10)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            if snapshot is not None:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                total_score = role_bonus + self._score_snapshot(snapshot)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                choice = ModelChoice(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    model=model,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    provider=provider,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    account_email=snapshot.email,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    reason=(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                        f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"fallback: role={stage.model_role}, complexity={task.complexity}, \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                        f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"remaining={snapshot.remaining_percent}%, \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                        f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"reset_in={snapshot.time_until_reset_hours:.1f}h\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    ),\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                )\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            else:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                total_score = role_bonus + f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"{email}.json\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\ndef json.load(f)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\ndef _atomic_write_json(path: Path, data: Dict[str, Any]) -> path.with_suffix(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\".tmp\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    with encoding=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"utf-8\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\") as f:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        json.dump(data, f, indent=2, sort_keys=True)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        f.flush()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        os.fsync(f.fileno())\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    os.replace(tmp_path, path)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    os.chmod(path, 0o600)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\ndef _load_index() -> AccountIndex:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    if not ACCOUNTS_INDEX_PATH.exists():\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return AccountIndex(accounts=[], load_account(email: str) -> CodexAccount:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    path = _account_path(email)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    if not path.exists():\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n {email}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    return index.accounts:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        try:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            accounts.append(load_account(email))\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        except tokens.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"access_token\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\") or not account\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    now = int(time.time())\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    existing = None\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    try:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        existing = load_account(email)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    except FileNotFoundError:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        pass\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    account = CodexAccount(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        email=email,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        access_token=tokens.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"access_token\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\") or (existing.account_id if existing else \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"),\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        plan_type=plan_type or (existing.plan_type if existing else \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"unknown\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"),\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n disabled is None) else bool(disabled),\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        created_at=existing.created_at if existing else now,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        last_used=now if update_last_used else (existing.last_used if existing else now),\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    )\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n account\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\ndef get_active_account() -> CodexAccount:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    index = None:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    index = _load_index()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    if email in index.accounts:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        index.accounts.remove(email)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    if index.active_account == email:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        index.active_account = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n path.exists():\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        path.unlink()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\ndef import_current_account() -> CodexAccount:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    auth_data = auth.read_codex_auth()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    tokens = auth_data.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"tokens\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", {})\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    if not tokens.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"access_token\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\") or not stderr = await process.communicate()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return CommandExecution(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n stdout.strip()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        if provider != \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"codex\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" or not text:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            return json.JSONDecodeError:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            return text\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        if isinstance(parsed, dict):\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            if loop.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nfrom    def __init__(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        self,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        *,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        db_path: str | Path = settings.HARNESS_DB_PATH,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        artifact_root: str | Path = settings.HARNESS_ARTIFACT_DIR,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        intake_agent: Optional[IntakeAgent] None,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    ) -> None:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        self.db = HarnessDB(db_path)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        self.task_queue = TaskQueue(self.db)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        self.handoff = HandoffProtocol(artifact_root)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        self.checkpoints = CheckpointStore(artifact_root)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        self.intake = intake_agent or IntakeAgent()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        self.router = quota_router or QuotaRouter()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        self.executor = stage_executor or StageExecutor()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def submit_task(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        self,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        description: str,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        *,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        title: Optional[str] = None,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        goal: Optional[str] = None,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        verify_cmd: Optional[str] = None,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        priority: int = 50,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        working_dir: Optional[str] = None,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    ) -> TaskRecord:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        intake = self.intake.plan_task(description, goal=goal, verify_cmd=verify_cmd)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        if title:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            intake = replace(intake, title=title)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return self.submit_intake(intake, priority=priority, working_dir=working_dir)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def submit_intake(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        self,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        intake: IntakeResult,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        *,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        priority: int = 50,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        working_dir: Optional[str] = None,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        status: TaskStatus = TaskStatus.EXECUTING,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    ) -> TaskRecord:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        task = self.task_queue.create_task(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            title=intake.title,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            description=intake.description,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            goal=intake.goal,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            verify_cmd=intake.verify_cmd,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            complexity=intake.complexity,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            priority=priority,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            status=status,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            working_dir=working_dir,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        )\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        self.task_queue.save_stages(task.task_id, intake.stages)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return task\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    async def run_once(self) -> Optional[TaskRecord]:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        await self._recover_paused_quota_tasks()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        task = self.task_queue.pick_next_runnable_task()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        if task is None:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            return None\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        if self.task_queue.count_stages(task.task_id) == 0:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            await self._plan_missing_stages(task)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            task = self.task_queue.get_task(task.task_id) or task\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        stage = self.task_queue.next_pending_stage(task.task_id)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        if stage is None:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            await self._finish_task(task)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            return self.task_queue.get_task(task.task_id)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        await self._run_stage(task, stage)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return self.task_queue.get_task(task.task_id)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    async def run_forever(self, poll_interval_sec: int = settings.HARNESS_POLL_INTERVAL_SEC) -> None:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        while True:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            task = await self.run_once()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            if task is None:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                await asyncio.sleep(poll_interval_sec)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def status_report(self) -> list[dict[str, object]]:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n ]\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    async def _plan_missing_stages(self, task: TaskRecord) -> None:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n parser\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nasync def _prompt_user_approval(command: str, context: str) -> bool | None:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    if not sys.stdin.isatty():\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return None\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    print(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Permission request for command: {command}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    if context:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        print(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Context: {context}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    answer = await asyncio.to_thread(input, \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Allow? [y/N]: \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    lowered = answer.strip().lower()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    if lowered in {\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"y\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"yes\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"}:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return True\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    if lowered in {\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"no\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"}:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return False\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    return None\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\ndef build_cli_harness() -> Harness:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    chat_client = None\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    permission_gate = PermissionGate(user_approver=_prompt_user_approval)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    stage_executor = StageExecutor(chat_client=chat_client, permission_gate=permission_gate)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    quota_router = QuotaRouter(chat_client=stage_executor.chat_client)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    return Harness(quota_router=quota_router, stage_executor=stage_executor)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\ndef _read_multiline_description() -> str:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    print(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Describe the task. Press Enter twice to finish:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    lines: list[str] = []\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    while True:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        line = input()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        if not line and (not lines or not lines[-1]):\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            break\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        lines.append(line)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    return \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\".join(lines).strip()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\ndef _run_chat_submission(harness: Harness, description: str | None, priority: int, working_dir: str | None) -> TaskRecord:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    initial_description = description or _read_multiline_description()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    if not initial_description:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        raise ValueError(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Task description cannot be empty.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    base = harness.intake.plan_task(initial_description)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    questions = harness.intake.generate_questions(initial_description, base.complexity)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    answers: dict[str, str] = {}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    for question in questions:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        suffix = f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" [{question.default}]\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" if question.default else \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        response = input(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"{question.prompt}{suffix}: \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\").strip()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        answers[question.key] = response or (question.default or \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    intake = harness.intake.apply_answers(initial_description, answers)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    return harness.submit_intake(intake, priority=priority, working_dir=working_dir)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nasync def _main_async(args: argparse.Namespace) -> int:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    harness = build_cli_harness()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    if args.command == \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"submit\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        task = goal=args.goal,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            verify_cmd=args.verify_cmd,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            priority=args.priority,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            working_dir=args.working_dir,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        )\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        print(task.task_id)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return 0\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    if args.command == print(json.dumps({\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"task_id\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": task.task_id, \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"title\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": task.title}, ensure_ascii=False))\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return 0\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    if args.command == harness.run_once()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        print(task.task_id if task else \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"idle\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return 0\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    if args.command == target\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"exit_code\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":0,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"status\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"completed\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"}}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n{\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"type\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"item.completed\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"item\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"id\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"item_12\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"type\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"agent_message\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"text\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\u63a5\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\u53e3\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\u8fb9\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\u754c\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\u5df2\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\u7ecf\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\u6bd4\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\u8f83\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\u6e05\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\u695a\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\u4e86\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\uff1a`QuotaRouter` \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\u73b0\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\u5728\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\u4f1a\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\u628a provider \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\u7ea7 quota CLI \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\u5b50\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\u547d\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\u4ee4\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\u8be5\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\u843d\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\u5728\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\u54ea\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\u4e00\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\u5c42\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\u3002\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"}}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n{\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"type\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"item.started\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"item\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"id\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"item_13\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"type\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"command_execution\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"command\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"/bin/bash -lc \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"sed -n '1,260p' models/quota_manager.py\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"aggregated_output\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"exit_code\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":null,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"status\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"in_progress\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"}}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n{\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"type\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"item.completed\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"item\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"id\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"item_13\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"type\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"command_execution\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"command\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"/bin/bash -lc \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"sed -n '1,260p' models/quota_manager.py\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"aggregated_output\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nUnified Quota Manager for Google (Antigravity) and Codex accounts.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nSmart switching algorithm \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\u2014 optimizes for:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n1. WASTE PREVENTION: Use quota before it expires (don't let resets waste unused quota)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n2. TASK SAFETY: Ensure >40% remaining when starting new tasks\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n3. CONTINUITY: Avoid unnecessary switching (anti-thrash)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nUnified scoring formula per account:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n  score = remaining + waste_urgency + safety_bonus + inertia\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nWhere:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n  - remaining: current remaining % (0-100)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n  - waste_urgency: remaining \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\u00d7 (WASTE_WINDOW - hours_to_reset) / WASTE_WINDOW\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\u2192 Boosts accounts with quota about to be lost on reset\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n  - safety_bonus: +15 if remaining > 40% (enough for a full task)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n  - inertia: +5 for current account (avoid switching for marginal gains)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nSwitch when best candidate's score exceeds current by > 10 points.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nfrom __future__ import annotations\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nimport json\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nimport time\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nfrom dataclasses import dataclass, field\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nfrom datetime import datetime, timedelta\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nfrom enum import Enum\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nfrom pathlib import Path\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nfrom typing import Any, Optional\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nfrom models.codex.account import load_account as set_active_account as set_active_codex_account\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nfrom models.codex.account import get_active_email as get_active_codex_email\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nfrom models.codex.quota import fetch_quota as fetch_codex_quota\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nfrom models.google.account import load_account as load_google_account\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nfrom models.google.account import list_accounts as list_google_accounts_fn\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nfrom models.google.account import set_active_account as set_active_google_account\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nfrom models.google.account import get_active_email as get_active_google_email\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nfrom models.google.account import save_account as save_google_account\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nfrom models.google.oauth import ensure_fresh_token as ensure_fresh_google_token\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nfrom models.google.quota import fetch_account_quota as fetch_google_quota\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nclass Provider(str, Enum):\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    CODEX = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"codex\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    GOOGLE = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"google\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n@dataclass\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nclass QuotaSnapshot:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Point-in-time quota snapshot for an account.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    provider: Provider\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    email: str\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    account_id: str\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    plan_type: str\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    used_percent: int\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    reset_at: int                    # Unix timestamp\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    reset_at_readable: str           # Human-readable\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    time_until_reset_hours: float\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    @property\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def remaining_percent(self) -> int:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return max(0, 100 - self.used_percent)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    @property\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def is_exhausted(self) -> bool:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"True if quota is essentially depleted (>= 95%).\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return self.used_percent >= 95\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    @property\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def is_fresh(self) -> bool:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"True if just reset or will reset very soon.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return self.remaining_percent >= 90 or self.time_until_reset_hours < 0.5\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def __str__(self) -> str:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return (\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"{self.email:<40} {self.plan_type:<6} \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"[{self.used_percent:>3}%] \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"{self.time_until_reset_hours:>5.1f}h\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        )\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n@dataclass\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nclass SwitchDecision:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Result of quota analysis and switching decision.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    should_switch: bool\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    reason: str\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    target_email: Optional[str]\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    target_remaining: Optional[int]\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    current_email: Optional[str]\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    current_remaining: Optional[int]\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def __str__(self) -> str:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        if not self.should_switch:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            return f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"STAY on {self.current_email} ({self.current_remaining}% remaining) - {self.reason}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return (\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"SWITCH {self.current_email} \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\u2192 {self.target_email} \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"({self.current_remaining}% \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\u2192 {self.target_remaining}%) - {self.reason}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        )\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nclass QuotaManager:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    Intelligent quota manager for multi-provider, multi-account systems.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    Optimizes for three goals (in priority order):\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    1. WASTE PREVENTION \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\u2014 Use quota before it resets (don't lose unused quota)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    2. TASK SAFETY \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\u2014 Prefer accounts with >40% for new tasks\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    3. CONTINUITY \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\u2014 Avoid unnecessary mid-session switching\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    Uses a unified scoring formula:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n      score = remaining + waste_urgency + safety_bonus + inertia\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    TASK_SAFETY_THRESHOLD = 40              # Prefer accounts > 40% for new tasks\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    FRESH_QUOTA_THRESHOLD = 90              # Consider \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"fresh\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" if >= 90%\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    WASTE_WINDOW_HOURS = 6                  # Boost accounts resetting within 6h\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    SAFETY_BONUS = 15                       # Score bonus for accounts > 40%\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    INERTIA_BONUS = 5                       # Score bonus for staying on current\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    HEALTHY_INERTIA = 20                    # Extra inertia when current is healthy (>40%)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    SWITCH_THRESHOLD = 10                   # Minimum score improvement to switch\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def __init__(self, check_interval_minutes: int = 60):\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        self.check_interval_minutes = check_interval_minutes\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        self.last_check_time = 0\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        self.account_reset_times: dict[str, int] = {}  # email -> reset_at timestamp\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        self.last_switch_time = 0\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        self.state_file = Path.home() / \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\".codex\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" / \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"quota_manager_state.json\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        self._load_state()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def _load_state(self) -> None:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Load persistent state (reset times).\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        if self.state_file.exists():\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            try:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                with open(self.state_file) as f:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    data = json.load(f)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                self.account_reset_times = {k: int(v) for k, v in data.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"reset_times\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", {}).items()}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            except Exception:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                self.account_reset_times = {}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def _save_state(self) -> None:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Save persistent state.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        self.state_file.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        with open(self.state_file, \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"w\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\") as f:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            json.dump(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                {\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"reset_times\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": self.account_reset_times},\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                f,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                indent=2,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            )\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def fetch_all_quotas(self) -> list[QuotaSnapshot]:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Fetch quota for all accounts (both providers).\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        snapshots: list[QuotaSnapshot] = []\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        now = int(time.time())\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        # Codex accounts\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        try:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            for email in list_codex_accounts():\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                try:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    account = load_codex_account(email)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    quota = fetch_codex_quota(account.access_token, account.account_id)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    reset_at = quota.weekly_reset_at\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    time_until_reset = (reset_at - now) / 3600.0  # hours\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    snapshot = QuotaSnapshot(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                        provider=Provider.CODEX,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                        email=account.email,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                        account_id=account.account_id,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                        plan_type=quota.plan_type or \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"unknown\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                        used_percent=quota.weekly_used_percent,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                        reset_at=reset_at,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                        reset_at_readable=datetime.fromtimestamp(reset_at).strftime(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"),\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                        time_until_reset_hours=time_until_reset,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    )\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    snapshots.append(snapshot)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    self.account_reset_times[account.email] = reset_at\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                except Exception as e:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    print(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Warning: failed to fetch Codex quota for {email}: {e}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        except Exception as e:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            print(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Warning: failed to load Codex accounts: {e}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        # Google accounts\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        try:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            accounts = list_google_accounts_fn()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            # Google's list_accounts returns Account objects directly\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            for account in accounts:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                try:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    # Refresh token if expired\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    account.token = ensure_fresh_google_token(account.token)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    save_google_account(account)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    quota, _ = fetch_google_quota(account.token.access_token, account.project_id)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    # Google quotas are per-model, find the max usage\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    max_used_percent = 0\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    max_reset_at = 0\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    for model_quota in quota.models:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                        used = 100 - (model_quota.percentage or 0)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                        if used > max_used_percent:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                            max_used_percent = used\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                        if model_quota.reset_time:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                            try:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                                reset_ts = int(datetime.fromisoformat(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                                    model_quota.reset_time.replace(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Z\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"+00:00\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                                ).timestamp())\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                                if reset_ts > max_reset_at:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                                    max_reset_at = reset_ts\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                            except Exception:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                                pass\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    if max_reset_at == 0:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                        max_reset_at = now + 86400  # Default 24h if unknown\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    time_until_reset = (max_reset_at - now) / 3600.0\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    snapshot = QuotaSnapshot(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                        provider=Provider.GOOGLE,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                        email=account.email,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                        account_id=account.project_id or \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                        plan_type=quota.subscription_tier or \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"unknown\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                        used_percent=max_used_percent,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                        reset_at=max_reset_at,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                        reset_at_readable=datetime.fromtimestamp(max_reset_at).strftime(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"),\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                        time_until_reset_hours=time_until_reset,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    )\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    snapshots.append(snapshot)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    self.account_reset_times[account.email] = max_reset_at\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                except Exception as e:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    print(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Warning: failed to fetch Google quota for {account.email}: {e}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        except Exception as e:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            print(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Warning: failed to load Google accounts: {e}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        self._save_state()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return sorted(snapshots, key=lambda s: (-s.remaining_percent, s.time_until_reset_hours))\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def _score_account(self, snapshot: QuotaSnapshot, is_current: bool = False) -> float:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        Unified scoring formula for an account.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        score = remaining + waste_urgency + safety_bonus + inertia\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        Components:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        - remaining: base value (0-100)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        - waste_urgency: boosts accounts with quota about to expire\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n          = remaining \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\u00d7 (WASTE_WINDOW - hours_to_reset) / WASTE_WINDOW\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n          Only applies when hours_to_reset < WASTE_WINDOW\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        - safety_bonus: +15 for accounts with >40% (can sustain a full task)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        - inertia: +5 for current account (anti-thrash)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        Examples:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        - Account A: 50% remaining, 2h until reset, current\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n          \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\u2192 50 + 50*(6-2)/6 + 15 + 5 = 50 + 33.3 + 15 + 5 = 103.3\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        - Account B: 80% remaining, 120h until reset, not current\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n          \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\u2192 80 + 0 + 15 + 0 = 95\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        - Account C: 20% remaining, 1h until reset, not current\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n          \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\u2192 20 + 20*(6-1)/6 + 0 + 0 = 20 + 16.7 + 0 = 36.7\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\u2192 Switch to A (use its 50% before reset), even though B has more remaining\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        remaining = snapshot.remaining_percent\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"exit_code\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":0,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"status\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"completed\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"}}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n{\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"type\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"item.started\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"item\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"id\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"item_14\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"type\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"command_execution\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"command\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"/bin/bash -lc \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"sed -n '1,260p' harness/models.py\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"aggregated_output\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"exit_code\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":null,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"status\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"in_progress\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"}}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n{\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"type\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"item.completed\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"item\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"id\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"item_14\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"type\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"command_execution\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"command\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"/bin/bash data structures for the autonomous harness.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nfrom Enum\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nfrom typing import Any, Optional\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nclass TaskStatus(str, Enum):\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    PENDING = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"pending\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    PLANNING = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"planning\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    EXECUTING = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"paused_permission\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    DONE = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"done\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    FAILED = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"failed\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nclass StageStatus(str, Enum):\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    PENDING = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"pending\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    RUNNING = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"running\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    DONE = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"done\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    FAILED =
