{"type":"item.completed","item":{"id":"item_20","type":"command_execution","command":"/bin/bash -lc \"sed -n '1,180p' harness/intake.py\"","aggregated_output":"\"\"\"Requirement intake and default stage planning.\"\"\"\nfrom __future__ import annotations\n\nimport re\n\nfrom harness.models import ClarificationQuestion, IntakeResult, PlannedStage\n\n\nclass IntakeAgent:\n    \"\"\"Heuristic intake agent used before LLM-backed clarification exists.\"\"\"\n\n    COMPLEXITY_RULES = {\n        \"trivial\": {\n            \"max_questions\": 0,\n            \"stages\": [(\"code\", \"coder\"), (\"github_ops\", \"github_ops\")],\n        },\n        \"simple\": {\n            \"max_questions\": 1,\n            \"stages\": [(\"code\", \"coder\"), (\"review\", \"reviewer\"), (\"github_ops\", \"github_ops\")],\n        },\n        \"medium\": {\n            \"max_questions\": 2,\n            \"stages\": [\n                (\"plan\", \"planner\"),\n                (\"code\", \"coder\"),\n                (\"review\", \"reviewer\"),\n                (\"test\", \"tester\"),\n                (\"github_ops\", \"github_ops\"),\n            ],\n        },\n        \"complex\": {\n            \"max_questions\": 3,\n            \"stages\": [\n                (\"plan\", \"planner\"),\n                (\"code\", \"coder\"),\n                (\"review\", \"reviewer\"),\n                (\"test\", \"tester\"),\n                (\"e2e_test\", \"e2e_tester\"),\n                (\"github_ops\", \"github_ops\"),\n            ],\n        },\n        \"epic\": {\n            \"max_questions\": 4,\n            \"stages\": [\n                (\"plan\", \"planner\"),\n                (\"code\", \"coder\"),\n                (\"review\", \"reviewer\"),\n                (\"test\", \"tester\"),\n                (\"e2e_test\", \"e2e_tester\"),\n                (\"github_ops\", \"github_ops\"),\n                (\"summary\", \"summarizer\"),\n            ],\n        },\n    }\n\n    COMPLEXITY_KEYWORDS = {\n        \"complex\": {\"architecture\", \"migrate\", \"quota\", \"checkpoint\", \"permission\", \"workflow\"},\n        \"epic\": {\"rewrite\", \"distributed\", \"multi-repo\", \"end-to-end platform\"},\n    }\n\n    def assess_complexity(self, description: str) -> str:\n        normalized = \" \".join(description.lower().split())\n        word_count = len(normalized.split())\n        line_count = len([line for line in description.splitlines() if line.strip()])\n\n        if any(keyword in normalized for keyword in self.COMPLEXITY_KEYWORDS[\"epic\"]) or word_count > 220:\n            return \"epic\"\n        if any(keyword in normalized for keyword in self.COMPLEXITY_KEYWORDS[\"complex\"]) or word_count > 120:\n            return \"complex\"\n        if line_count >= 4 or word_count > 40:\n            return \"medium\"\n        if word_count <= 10:\n            return \"trivial\"\n        return \"simple\"\n\n    def generate_title(self, description: str) -> str:\n        first_line = next((line.strip() for line in description.splitlines() if line.strip()), \"Untitled task\")\n        cleaned = re.sub(r\"\\s+\", \" \", first_line).strip(\" -\")\n        if len(cleaned) <= 80:\n            return cleaned\n        clipped = cleaned[:80].rstrip()\n        last_space = clipped.rfind(\" \")\n        if last_space > 40:\n            clipped = clipped[:last_space]\n        return clipped\n\n    def plan_task(\n        self,\n        description: str,\n        *,\n        goal: str | None = None,\n        verify_cmd: str | None = None,\n        model_overrides: dict[str, tuple[str, str]] | None = None,\n    ) -> IntakeResult:\n        complexity = self.assess_complexity(description)\n        stage_defs = self.COMPLEXITY_RULES[complexity][\"stages\"]\n        overrides = model_overrides or {}\n        stages = [\n            PlannedStage(\n                stage_type=stage_type,\n                stage_order=index,\n                model_role=model_role,\n                assigned_model=overrides.get(stage_type, (None, None))[0],\n                assigned_provider=overrides.get(stage_type, (None, None))[1],\n                verify_cmd=verify_cmd if stage_type in {\"test\", \"e2e_test\"} else None,\n                metadata=self._stage_metadata(stage_type),\n            )\n            for index, (stage_type, model_role) in enumerate(stage_defs, start=1)\n        ]\n        return IntakeResult(\n            title=self.generate_title(description),\n            description=description.strip(),\n            complexity=complexity,\n            stages=stages,\n            goal=goal,\n            verify_cmd=verify_cmd,\n            questions=[],\n        )\n\n    GITHUB_OPS_COMMANDS = [\n        'git add -A',\n        'git commit -m \"auto: {summary}\"',\n        'git push',\n    ]\n\n    def _stage_metadata(self, stage_type: str) -> dict:\n        if stage_type == \"github_ops\":\n            return {\n                \"instructions\": \"Commit all changes and push to remote.\",\n                \"commands\": list(self.GITHUB_OPS_COMMANDS),\n            }\n        return {\n            \"instructions\": f\"Execute the `{stage_type}` stage and leave a concise handoff for the next stage.\"\n        }\n\n    def generate_questions(self, description: str, complexity: str | None = None) -> list[ClarificationQuestion]:\n        normalized = description.lower()\n        resolved_complexity = complexity or self.assess_complexity(description)\n        max_questions = self.COMPLEXITY_RULES[resolved_complexity][\"max_questions\"]\n        questions: list[ClarificationQuestion] = []\n\n        if any(keyword in normalized for keyword in {\"blacklist\", \"whitelist\", \"config\", \"setting\"}):\n            questions.append(\n                ClarificationQuestion(\n                    key=\"storage\",\n                    prompt=\"配置或列表应该存在哪里？\",\n                    default=\"config file\",\n                )\n            )\n\n        if \"test\" not in normalized and \"pytest\" not in normalized:\n            questions.append(\n                ClarificationQuestion(\n                    key=\"verify_cmd\",\n                    prompt=\"验收命令是什么？没有就留空。\",\n                    default=\"pytest\",\n                )\n            )\n\n        if resolved_complexity in {\"medium\", \"complex\", \"epic\"}:\n            questions.append(\n                ClarificationQuestion(\n                    key=\"goal\",\n                    prompt=\"你最关心的验收目标是什么？\",\n                    default=\"实现需求并通过相关测试\",\n                )\n            )\n\n        if resolved_complexity in {\"simple\", \"medium\", \"complex\", \"epic\"}:\n            questions.append(\n                ClarificationQuestion(\n                    key=\"needs_cli\",\n                    prompt=\"是否需要额外的 CLI 或管理入口？(y/N)\",\n                    default=\"n\",\n                )\n            )\n\n        return questions[:max_questions]\n\n    def apply_answers(\n","exit_code":0,"status":"completed"}}

{"type":"item.completed","item":{"id":"item_21","type":"command_execution","command":"/bin/bash -lc \"sed -n '220,360p' harness/task_queue.py\"","aggregated_output":"                \"\"\"\n                SELECT * FROM stages\n                WHERE task_id = ? AND status IN (?, ?)\n                ORDER BY stage_order ASC\n                \"\"\",\n                (task_id, StageStatus.DONE.value, StageStatus.SKIPPED.value),\n            ).fetchall()\n        return [self._row_to_stage(row) for row in rows]\n\n    def next_pending_stage(self, task_id: str) -> Optional[StageRecord]:\n        with self.db.connect() as conn:\n            row = conn.execute(\n                \"\"\"\n                SELECT * FROM stages\n                WHERE task_id = ? AND status = ?\n                ORDER BY stage_order ASC\n                LIMIT 1\n                \"\"\",\n                (task_id, StageStatus.PENDING.value),\n            ).fetchone()\n        return self._row_to_stage(row) if row else None\n\n    def assign_stage_model(\n        self,\n        stage_id: str,\n        model: str,\n        provider: str,\n        *,\n        account_email: Optional[str] = None,\n        reason: Optional[str] = None,\n    ) -> None:\n        metadata = self._load_stage_metadata(stage_id)\n        metadata[\"selected_account_email\"] = account_email\n        if reason:\n            metadata[\"selection_reason\"] = reason\n        with self.db.connect() as conn:\n            conn.execute(\n                \"\"\"\n                UPDATE stages\n                SET assigned_model = ?, assigned_provider = ?, metadata = ?\n                WHERE stage_id = ?\n                \"\"\",\n                (model, provider, json.dumps(metadata), stage_id),\n            )\n\n    def update_stage_metadata(self, stage_id: str, metadata_patch: dict[str, Any]) -> None:\n        metadata = self._load_stage_metadata(stage_id)\n        metadata.update(metadata_patch)\n        with self.db.connect() as conn:\n            conn.execute(\n                \"UPDATE stages SET metadata = ? WHERE stage_id = ?\",\n                (json.dumps(metadata), stage_id),\n            )\n\n    def mark_stage_running(self, stage_id: str, handoff_doc_path: str) -> None:\n        now = utcnow_iso()\n        with self.db.connect() as conn:\n            conn.execute(\n                \"\"\"\n                UPDATE stages\n                SET status = ?, handoff_doc_path = ?, started_at = ?\n                WHERE stage_id = ?\n                \"\"\",\n                (StageStatus.RUNNING.value, handoff_doc_path, now, stage_id),\n            )\n\n    def complete_stage(\n        self,\n        stage_id: str,\n        *,\n        result_summary: Optional[str] = None,\n        token_used: int = 0,\n        duration_sec: float = 0.0,\n    ) -> None:\n        with self.db.connect() as conn:\n            conn.execute(\n                \"\"\"\n                UPDATE stages\n                SET status = ?, result_summary = ?, token_used = ?, duration_sec = ?,\n                    finished_at = ?\n                WHERE stage_id = ?\n                \"\"\",\n                (\n                    StageStatus.DONE.value,\n                    result_summary,\n                    token_used,\n                    duration_sec,\n                    utcnow_iso(),\n                    stage_id,\n                ),\n            )\n\n    def skip_stage(self, stage_id: str, *, result_summary: Optional[str] = None) -> None:\n        with self.db.connect() as conn:\n            conn.execute(\n                \"\"\"\n                UPDATE stages\n                SET status = ?, result_summary = ?, finished_at = ?\n                WHERE stage_id = ?\n                \"\"\",\n                (StageStatus.SKIPPED.value, result_summary, utcnow_iso(), stage_id),\n            )\n\n    def reset_stage_to_pending(\n        self, stage_id: str, *, retry_count: Optional[int] = None, clear_model: bool = True\n    ) -> None:\n        query = \"UPDATE stages SET status = ?, started_at = NULL\"\n        params: list[object] = [StageStatus.PENDING.value]\n        if clear_model:\n            query += \", assigned_model = NULL, assigned_provider = NULL\"\n        if retry_count is not None:\n            query += \", retry_count = ?\"\n            params.append(retry_count)\n        query += \" WHERE stage_id = ?\"\n        params.append(stage_id)\n        with self.db.connect() as conn:\n            conn.execute(query, tuple(params))\n\n    def fail_stage(self, stage_id: str, *, result_summary: Optional[str], retry_count: int) -> None:\n        with self.db.connect() as conn:\n            conn.execute(\n                \"\"\"\n                UPDATE stages\n                SET status = ?, result_summary = ?, retry_count = ?, finished_at = ?\n                WHERE stage_id = ?\n                \"\"\",\n                (\n                    StageStatus.FAILED.value,\n                    result_summary,\n                    retry_count,\n                    utcnow_iso(),\n                    stage_id,\n                ),\n            )\n\n    def log_permission_request(self, record: PermissionRequestRecord) -> None:\n        with self.db.connect() as conn:\n            conn.execute(\n                \"\"\"\n                INSERT INTO permission_requests (\n                    request_id, stage_id, action, context, risk_level,\n","exit_code":0,"status":"completed"}}

{"type":"item.completed","item":{"id":"item_22","type":"command_execution","command":"/bin/bash -lc \"sed -n '1,220p' tests/harness/test_model_registry.py\"","aggregated_output":"import pytest\n\nfrom harness.model_registry import AliasCollisionError, ModelRegistry\n\n\n@pytest.fixture()\ndef registry(tmp_path):\n    catalog = tmp_path / \"models.yaml\"\n    catalog.write_text(\n        \"\"\"\\\nmodels:\n  claude-opus-4-6:\n    provider: claude\n    chat2api_id: copilot-claude-opus\n    cli_model_id: opus\n    aliases: [opus, claude-opus]\n  gpt-5.4-codex:\n    provider: codex\n    chat2api_id: codex\n    aliases: [codex, gpt-5.4]\n  gemini-3.1-pro:\n    provider: google\n    chat2api_id: gemini-pro\n    cli_model_id: gemini-3.1-pro-preview\n    aliases: [gemini-pro, gemini]\n  gpt-4o:\n    provider: github\n    chat2api_id: copilot-gpt4o\n    aliases: [gpt4o]\nroles:\n  coder:\n    - gpt-5.4-codex\n    - gemini-3.1-pro\n\"\"\",\n        encoding=\"utf-8\",\n    )\n    return ModelRegistry(catalog)\n\n\ndef test_resolve_canonical_unchanged(registry):\n    assert registry.resolve(\"claude-opus-4-6\") == \"claude-opus-4-6\"\n\n\ndef test_resolve_alias(registry):\n    assert registry.resolve(\"opus\") == \"claude-opus-4-6\"\n    assert registry.resolve(\"codex\") == \"gpt-5.4-codex\"\n    assert registry.resolve(\"gemini\") == \"gemini-3.1-pro\"\n    assert registry.resolve(\"gpt4o\") == \"gpt-4o\"\n\n\ndef test_resolve_unknown_returns_input(registry):\n    assert registry.resolve(\"unknown-model\") == \"unknown-model\"\n\n\ndef test_chat2api_id(registry):\n    assert registry.chat2api_id(\"claude-opus-4-6\") == \"copilot-claude-opus\"\n    assert registry.chat2api_id(\"opus\") == \"copilot-claude-opus\"\n    assert registry.chat2api_id(\"gpt-5.4-codex\") == \"codex\"\n\n\ndef test_cli_model_id(registry):\n    assert registry.cli_model_id(\"claude-opus-4-6\") == \"opus\"\n    assert registry.cli_model_id(\"gemini-3.1-pro\") == \"gemini-3.1-pro-preview\"\n    # Falls back to canonical when cli_model_id not set\n    assert registry.cli_model_id(\"gpt-5.4-codex\") == \"gpt-5.4-codex\"\n\n\ndef test_provider(registry):\n    assert registry.provider(\"claude-opus-4-6\") == \"claude\"\n    assert registry.provider(\"codex\") == \"codex\"\n    assert registry.provider(\"gpt4o\") == \"github\"\n\n\ndef test_models_for_role(registry):\n    assert registry.models_for_role(\"coder\") == [\"gpt-5.4-codex\", \"gemini-3.1-pro\"]\n\n\ndef test_models_for_unknown_role_returns_all(registry):\n    result = registry.models_for_role(\"nonexistent\")\n    assert set(result) == {\"claude-opus-4-6\", \"gpt-5.4-codex\", \"gemini-3.1-pro\", \"gpt-4o\"}\n\n\ndef test_available_canonical_names(registry):\n    live = {\"codex\", \"gemini-pro\", \"copilot-gpt4o\"}\n    available = registry.available_canonical_names(live)\n    assert \"gpt-5.4-codex\" in available\n    assert \"gemini-3.1-pro\" in available\n    assert \"gpt-4o\" in available\n    assert \"claude-opus-4-6\" not in available\n\n\ndef test_alias_collision_raises(tmp_path):\n    catalog = tmp_path / \"bad.yaml\"\n    catalog.write_text(\n        \"\"\"\\\nmodels:\n  model-a:\n    provider: test\n    aliases: [shared-alias]\n  model-b:\n    provider: test\n    aliases: [shared-alias]\n\"\"\",\n        encoding=\"utf-8\",\n    )\n    with pytest.raises(AliasCollisionError, match=\"shared-alias\"):\n        ModelRegistry(catalog)\n","exit_code":0,"status":"completed"}}

duration_sec=result.duration_sec,\n                token_used=result.token_used,\n                summary=result.summary,\n                files_changed=result.files_changed,\n            )\n\n self.task_queue.reset_stage_to_pending(stage.stage_id, retry_count=retry_count)\n                self.task_queue.update_task_status(task.task_id, TaskStatus.PAUSED_QUOTA)\n                checkpoint = handoff_doc_path=stage.handoff_doc_path or str(self.handoff.handoff_path(task, stage)),\n                    files_modified=[],\n                    retry_count=retry_count,\n                    paused_reason=\"quota_exhausted\",\n                    paused_at=utcnow_iso(),\n                    partial_output=exc.partial_output,\n                )\n                self.checkpoints.save(checkpoint)\n                self._emit_stage_event(\n                    \"stage_paused_quota\",\n                    task,\n                    stage,\n                    error=str(exc),\n                    provider=exc.provider,\n                )\n\n            self.task_queue.log_quota_event(\n                QuotaEventRecord(\n                    event_id=uuid.uuid4().hex,\n                    provider=exc.provider,\n                    account_email=account_email,\n                    event_type=\"quota_retry\" if within_same_model_budget else \"exhausted\",\n                    details={\"stage_id\": stage.stage_id, \"task_id\": task.task_id, \"retry_count\": retry_count},\n                    created_at=utcnow_iso(),\n self.task_queue.update_task_status(task.task_id, TaskStatus.PAUSED_PERMISSION)\n            self.task_queue.log_permission_request(\n                PermissionRequestRecord(\n                 risk_level=exc.decision.risk_level,\n                    decision=exc.decision.decision,\n                    voters=[\n                        {\"model\": vote.model, \"vote\": vote.vote, \"reason\": vote.reason}\n                        for vote in exc.decision.votes\n","exit_code":0,"status":"completed"}}

{"type":"item.started","item":{"id":"item_29","type":"command_execution","command":"/bin/bash -lc \"sed -n '1,260p' harness/quota_router.py\"","aggregated_output":"","exit_code":null,"status":"in_progress"}}
{"type":"item.completed","item":{"id":"item_29","type":"command_execution","command":"/bin/bash -lc \"sed -n '1,260p' harness/quota_router.py\"","aggregated_output":"\"\"\"Quota-aware model routing.\"\"\"\nfrom __future__ import annotations\n\nimport json\nfrom dataclasses import dataclass\nfrom typing import Any, Optional\n\nfrom config import settings\nfrom harness.chat2api_client import Chat2APIClient\nfrom harness.model_registry import ModelRegistry\nfrom harness.models import ModelChoice, StageRecord, TaskRecord\nfrom models.quota_manager import QuotaManager, QuotaSnapshot\n\n\nclass AllQuotaExhaustedError(RuntimeError):\n    \"\"\"Raised when no configured candidate model is currently usable.\"\"\"\n\n\n@dataclass(frozen=True)\nclass EligibleCandidate:\n    model: str\n    provider: str\n    role_index: int\n    snapshot: Optional[QuotaSnapshot] = None\n\n\nclass QuotaRouter:\n    \"\"\"Select a model using role preferences, availability, and quota heuristics.\"\"\"\n\n    def __init__(\n        self,\n        *,\n        registry: Optional[ModelRegistry] = None,\n        quota_manager: Optional[QuotaManager] = None,\n        chat_client: Optional[Chat2APIClient] = None,\n        min_remaining_pct: int = settings.HARNESS_MIN_QUOTA_PCT,\n        enable_llm_selector: bool = True,\n    ) -> None:\n        self.registry = registry or ModelRegistry()\n        self.quota_manager = quota_manager or QuotaManager()\n        self.chat_client = chat_client or Chat2APIClient()\n        self.min_remaining_pct = min_remaining_pct\n        self.enable_llm_selector = enable_llm_selector\n\n    def models_for_role(self, role: str) -> list[str]:\n        return self.registry.models_for_role(role)\n\n    def get_model_info(self, model: str) -> dict[str, Any]:\n        return self.registry.get_info(model)\n\n    def list_available_models(self) -> list[str]:\n        \"\"\"Return canonical model names whose chat2api_id is currently live.\"\"\"\n        try:\n            live_ids = set(self.chat_client.list_models())\n        except Exception:\n            return self.registry.canonical_names()\n        if not live_ids:\n            return self.registry.canonical_names()\n        return self.registry.available_canonical_names(live_ids)\n\n    def can_run_stage(\n        self,\n        task: TaskRecord,\n        stage: StageRecord,\n        *,\n        quota_snapshot: Optional[list[QuotaSnapshot]] = None,\n        available_models: Optional[list[str]] = None,\n    ) -> bool:\n        try:\n            self.select_model(task, stage, quota_snapshot=quota_snapshot, available_models=available_models)\n        except AllQuotaExhaustedError:\n            return False\n        return True\n\n    def select_model(\n        self,\n        task: TaskRecord,\n        stage: StageRecord,\n        *,\n        quota_snapshot: Optional[list[QuotaSnapshot]] = None,\n        available_models: Optional[list[str]] = None,\n    ) -> ModelChoice:\n        quotas = quota_snapshot if quota_snapshot is not None else self.quota_manager.fetch_all_quotas()\n        available = set(available_models or self.list_available_models())\n        eligible = self._eligible_candidates(self.models_for_role(stage.model_role), quotas, available)\n\n        if not eligible:\n            raise AllQuotaExhaustedError(\n                f\"No eligible model for role={stage.model_role} with min_remaining={self.min_remaining_pct}%\"\n            )\n\n        if self.enable_llm_selector:\n            llm_choice = self._select_with_llm(task, stage, quotas, eligible)\n            if llm_choice is not None:\n                return llm_choice\n\n        return self._fallback_select(task, stage, eligible)\n\n    # ------------------------------------------------------------------\n    # Internals\n    # ------------------------------------------------------------------\n\n    def _eligible_candidates(\n        self,\n        candidates: list[str],\n        quotas: list[QuotaSnapshot],\n        available: set[str],\n    ) -> list[EligibleCandidate]:\n        eligible: list[EligibleCandidate] = []\n        for role_index, model in enumerate(candidates):\n            if model not in available:\n                continue\n            provider = self.registry.provider(model)\n            if not provider:\n                continue\n\n            provider_snapshots = [\n                snapshot\n                for snapshot in quotas\n                if snapshot.provider.value == provider and snapshot.remaining_percent >= self.min_remaining_pct\n            ]\n            if provider_snapshots:\n                for snapshot in provider_snapshots:\n                    eligible.append(\n                        EligibleCandidate(model=model, provider=provider, role_index=role_index, snapshot=snapshot)\n                    )\n            elif provider == \"github\":\n                eligible.append(\n                    EligibleCandidate(model=model, provider=provider, role_index=role_index, snapshot=None)\n                )\n        return eligible\n\n    def _select_with_llm(\n        self,\n        task: TaskRecord,\n        stage: StageRecord,\n        quotas: list[QuotaSnapshot],\n        eligible: list[EligibleCandidate],\n    ) -> ModelChoice | None:\n        selector_model = self._pick_selector_model()\n        if selector_model is None:\n            return None\n\n        prompt = self._build_selection_prompt(task, stage, quotas, eligible)\n        try:\n            raw = self.chat_client.chat(\n                model=selector_model,\n                prompt=prompt,\n                system=(\n                    \"You are code-orchestra's model router. \"\n                    \"Return compact JSON with fields model, provider, account, reason.\"\n                ),\n            )\n            parsed = json.loads(raw)\n        except Exception:\n            return None\n\n        chosen_model = parsed.get(\"model\")\n        if not isinstance(chosen_model, str):\n            return None\n\n        # LLM might respond with any alias — resolve to canonical\n        chosen_model = self.registry.resolve(chosen_model)\n\n        selected = self._match_llm_choice(chosen_model, parsed.get(\"account\"), eligible)\n        if selected is None:\n            return None\n\n        provider = selected.provider\n        snapshot = selected.snapshot\n        if snapshot is not None:\n            requested_account = parsed.get(\"account\")\n            if isinstance(requested_account, str) and requested_account and requested_account != snapshot.email:\n                alternative = next(\n                    (\n                        quota\n                        for quota in quotas\n                        if quota.provider.value == provider\n                        and quota.email == requested_account\n                        and quota.remaining_percent >= self.min_remaining_pct\n                    ),\n                    None,\n                )\n                if alternative is not None:\n                    snapshot = alternative\n\n        return ModelChoice(\n            model=chosen_model,\n            provider=provider,\n            account_email=snapshot.email if snapshot is not None else None,\n            reason=str(parsed.get(\"reason\") or \"llm_selector\"),\n        )\n\n    def _fallback_select(\n        self,\n        task: TaskRecord,\n        stage: StageRecord,\n        eligible: list[EligibleCandidate],\n    ) -> ModelChoice:\n        best_choice: ModelChoice | None = None\n        best_score: float | None = None\n\n        for candidate in eligible:\n            role_bonus = max(0, 40 - candidate.role_index * 10)\n            model = candidate.model\n            provider = candidate.provider\n            snapshot = candidate.snapshot\n            if snapshot is not None:\n                total_score = role_bonus + self._score_snapshot(snapshot)\n                choice = ModelChoice(\n                    model=model,\n                    provider=provider,\n                    account_email=snapshot.email,\n                    reason=(\n                        f\"fallback: role={stage.model_role}, complexity={task.complexity}, \"\n                        f\"remaining={snapshot.remaining_percent}%, \"\n                        f\"reset_in={snapshot.time_until_reset_hours:.1f}h\"\n                    ),\n                )\n            else:\n                total_score = role_bonus + self._score_provider_without_snapshot(provider)\n                choice = ModelChoice(\n                    model=model,\n                    provider=provider,\n                    account_email=None,\n                    reason=f\"fallback: role={stage.model_role}, complexity={task.complexity}, provider={provider}\",\n                )\n\n            if best_score is None or total_score > best_score:\n                best_score = total_score\n                best_choice = choice\n\n        if best_choice is None:\n            raise AllQuotaExhaustedError(\n                f\"No eligible model for role={stage.model_role} with min_remaining={self.min_remaining_pct}%\"\n            )\n        return best_choice\n\n    def _pick_selector_model(self) -> str | None:\n        \"\"\"Pick cheapest available model for LLM selection. Returns chat2api_id.\"\"\"\n        preferred = (\"gpt-4o\", \"claude-haiku-4-5\", \"gemini-3.1-pro\", \"gpt-5.4-codex\")\n        available = set(self.list_available_models())\n        for model in preferred:\n            if model in available:\n                return self.registry.chat2api_id(model)\n        return None\n\n    def _build_selection_prompt(\n        self,\n        task: TaskRecord,\n        stage: StageRecord,\n        quotas: list[QuotaSnapshot],\n        eligible: list[EligibleCandidate],\n    ) -> str:\n        lines = [\n            f\"Task: {task.title}\",\n            f\"Description: {task.description}\",\n            f\"Complexity: {task.complexity}\",\n            f\"Stage: {stage.stage_type} ({stage.model_role})\",\n            \"\",\n","exit_code":0,"status":"completed"}}

{"type":"item.completed","item":{"id":"item_31","type":"command_execution","command":"/bin/bash -lc \"sed -n '1,220p' harness/stage_executor.py\"","aggregated_output":"\"\"\"CLI-backed stage execution.\"\"\"\nfrom __future__ import annotations\n\nimport asyncio\nimport json\nimport subprocess\nimport time\nfrom dataclasses import dataclass\nfrom pathlib import Path\nfrom typing import Awaitable, Callable, Optional\n\nfrom config import settings\nfrom harness.chat2api_client import Chat2APIClient\nfrom harness.model_registry import ModelRegistry\nfrom harness.models import PermissionDecision, StageExecutionResult, StageRecord, StageStatus\nfrom harness.permission_gate import PermissionGate\n\n\n@dataclass(slots=True)\nclass CommandExecution:\n    returncode: int\n    stdout: str\n    stderr: str\n\n\nRunner = Callable[[list[str], str], Awaitable[CommandExecution]]\n\n\nclass StageExecutionError(RuntimeError):\n    \"\"\"Base stage execution error.\"\"\"\n\n\nclass QuotaExhaustedError(StageExecutionError):\n    \"\"\"Raised when the underlying provider reports quota exhaustion.\"\"\"\n\n    def __init__(self, provider: str, message: str, partial_output: str = \"\") -> None:\n        super().__init__(message)\n        self.provider = provider\n        self.partial_output = partial_output\n\n\nclass PermissionBlockedError(StageExecutionError):\n    \"\"\"Raised when an action is blocked by the permission gate.\"\"\"\n\n    def __init__(self, command: str, decision: PermissionDecision) -> None:\n        super().__init__(decision.reason)\n        self.command = command\n        self.decision = decision\n\n\nclass StageExecutor:\n    \"\"\"Execute planned stages via CLI backends or lightweight API calls.\"\"\"\n\n    APPROVED_DECISIONS = {\"auto_approved\", \"model_approved\", \"user_approved\"}\n\n    def __init__(\n        self,\n        *,\n        chat_client: Optional[Chat2APIClient] = None,\n        registry: Optional[ModelRegistry] = None,\n        permission_gate: Optional[PermissionGate] = None,\n        runner: Optional[Runner] = None,\n        codex_tier: str = settings.CODEX_TIER,\n    ) -> None:\n        self.chat_client = chat_client or Chat2APIClient()\n        self.registry = registry or ModelRegistry()\n        self.permission_gate = permission_gate or PermissionGate()\n        self.runner = runner or self._run_command\n        self.codex_tier = codex_tier\n\n    async def execute(self, stage: StageRecord, handoff_doc_path: str, working_dir: str | None) -> StageExecutionResult:\n        started_at = time.time()\n        prompt = Path(handoff_doc_path).read_text(encoding=\"utf-8\")\n        provider = stage.assigned_provider or self._infer_provider(stage.assigned_model or \"\")\n        cwd = working_dir or \".\"\n\n        if provider == \"chat2api\":\n            raw_output = await asyncio.to_thread(\n                self.chat_client.chat,\n                model=stage.assigned_model or \"\",\n                prompt=prompt,\n            )\n            duration = time.time() - started_at\n            return StageExecutionResult(\n                stage_id=stage.stage_id,\n                status=StageStatus.DONE,\n                raw_output=raw_output,\n                summary=self._summarize(raw_output),\n                duration_sec=duration,\n            )\n\n        if provider == \"github\":\n            return await self._run_github_ops(stage, prompt, cwd, started_at)\n\n        command = self.build_command(stage, prompt, cwd)\n        completed = await self._run_checked_command(\n            command,\n            cwd,\n            context=f\"stage={stage.stage_type} role={stage.model_role}\",\n        )\n        combined_output = completed.stdout.strip() or completed.stderr.strip()\n\n        if self._looks_like_quota_exhaustion(completed.stdout, completed.stderr, completed.returncode):\n            raise QuotaExhaustedError(provider or \"unknown\", combined_output, partial_output=completed.stdout)\n        if completed.returncode != 0:\n            raise StageExecutionError(combined_output or f\"Stage failed with exit code {completed.returncode}\")\n\n        duration = time.time() - started_at\n        files_changed = self._list_changed_files(cwd)\n        raw_output = self._normalize_output(completed.stdout, stage.assigned_provider)\n        return StageExecutionResult(\n            stage_id=stage.stage_id,\n            status=StageStatus.DONE,\n            raw_output=raw_output,\n            summary=self._summarize(raw_output),\n            files_changed=files_changed,\n            duration_sec=duration,\n            token_used=self._extract_token_usage(completed.stdout, stage.assigned_provider),\n        )\n\n    def build_command(self, stage: StageRecord, prompt: str, working_dir: str) -> list[str]:\n        provider = stage.assigned_provider or self._infer_provider(stage.assigned_model or \"\")\n        model = stage.assigned_model or \"\"\n        cli_model = self.registry.cli_model_id(model)\n        if provider == \"claude\":\n            return [\n                \"claude\",\n                \"-p\",\n                \"--output-format\",\n                \"stream-json\",\n                \"--model\",\n                cli_model,\n                \"--allowedTools\",\n                \"Edit,Read,Bash,Grep,Glob,Write\",\n                prompt,\n            ]\n        if provider == \"codex\":\n            cmd = [\n                \"codex\",\n                \"exec\",\n                \"--json\",\n                \"-C\",\n                working_dir,\n                \"--full-auto\",\n                prompt,\n            ]\n            return cmd\n        if provider == \"google\":\n            return [\n                \"gemini\",\n                \"--model\",\n                cli_model,\n                \"-y\",   # yolo mode: auto-approve all tool calls (write_file, shell, etc.)\n                \"-p\",\n                prompt,\n            ]\n        raise StageExecutionError(f\"Unsupported provider for CLI execution: {provider}\")\n\n    async def run_verify_cmd(self, verify_cmd: str, working_dir: str | None) -> CommandExecution:\n        return await self._run_checked_command(\n            [\"bash\", \"-lc\", verify_cmd],\n            working_dir or \".\",\n            context=\"verification command\",\n            display_command=verify_cmd,\n        )\n\n    async def _run_github_ops(\n        self,\n        stage: StageRecord,\n        prompt: str,\n        working_dir: str,\n        started_at: float,\n    ) -> StageExecutionResult:\n        commands = [str(item) for item in stage.metadata.get(\"commands\", [])]\n        if not commands:\n            summary = \"GitHub stage had no commands configured.\"\n            return StageExecutionResult(\n                stage_id=stage.stage_id,\n                status=StageStatus.DONE,\n                raw_output=summary,\n                summary=summary,\n                duration_sec=time.time() - started_at,\n            )\n\n        commit_summary = self._extract_commit_summary(prompt, stage)\n\n        outputs: list[str] = []\n        for raw_command in commands:\n            rendered = raw_command.format(\n                summary=commit_summary,\n                stage_type=stage.stage_type,\n                working_dir=working_dir,\n                prompt=prompt,\n                task_id=stage.task_id,\n            )\n            completed = await self._run_checked_command(\n                [\"bash\", \"-lc\", rendered],\n                working_dir,\n                context=f\"github_ops stage={stage.stage_type}\",\n                display_command=rendered,\n            )\n            if completed.returncode != 0:\n                raise StageExecutionError(completed.stderr.strip() or completed.stdout.strip() or rendered)\n            output = completed.stdout.strip() or completed.stderr.strip() or f\"Executed: {rendered}\"\n            outputs.append(output)\n\n        raw_output = \"\\n\".join(outputs).strip()\n        return StageExecutionResult(\n            stage_id=stage.stage_id,\n            status=StageStatus.DONE,\n            raw_output=raw_output,\n            summary=self._summarize(raw_output),\n            files_changed=self._list_changed_files(working_dir),\n            duration_sec=time.time() - started_at,\n        )\n\n    async def _run_checked_command(\n        self,\n        command: list[str],\n        cwd: str,\n","exit_code":0,"status":"completed"}}

{"type":"item.started","item":{"id":"item_44","type":"command_execution","command":"/bin/bash -lc \"python3 - <<'PY'\nfrom harness.db import HarnessDB\nfrom harness.task_queue import TaskQueue\nfrom harness.models import PlannedStage, TaskStatus\n\nqueue = TaskQueue(HarnessDB('/tmp/review-reset.db'))\ntask = queue.create_task('task', 'desc', status=TaskStatus.EXECUTING)\n[stage] = queue.save_stages(task.task_id, [PlannedStage(stage_type='code', stage_order=1, model_role='coder', assigned_model='gpt-5.4-codex', assigned_provider='codex')])\nprint('before', queue.get_stage(stage.stage_id).assigned_model, queue.get_stage(stage.stage_id).assigned_provider)\nqueue.reset_stage_to_pending(stage.stage_id, retry_count=1)\nloaded = queue.get_stage(stage.stage_id)\nprint('after', loaded.assigned_model, loaded.assigned_provider)\nPY\"","aggregated_output":"","exit_code":null,"status":"in_progress"}}
{"type":"item.started","item":{"id":"item_45","type":"command_execution","command":"/bin/bash -lc \"python3 - <<'PY'\nfrom harness.intake import IntakeAgent\nagent = IntakeAgent()\nresult = agent.plan_task(\n    'Add a blacklist setting to the scheduler, wire config loading, and cover it with tests.',\n    model_overrides={'review': ('gemini', 'google')},\n)\nreview = next(stage for stage in result.stages if stage.stage_type == 'review')\nprint(review.assigned_model, review.assigned_provider)\nPY\"","aggregated_output":"","exit_code":null,"status":"in_progress"}}
